when_to_use: Introduction, stating thesis objective

function: List research tasks
template: Для достижения поставленной цели необходимо решить следующие задачи: ___ .
when_to_use: Introduction, enumerating research tasks
common_mistakes: Missing link between tasks and goal

function: Describe thesis structure
template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы.
when_to_use: Introduction or conclusion, overviewing structure

function: Formulate research problem
template: Актуальность работы обусловлена необходимостью ___ .
when_to_use: Introduction, motivating the problem

function: Motivate research significance
template: Исследование ___ представляет интерес как для фундаментальной науки, так и для ___ .
when_to_use: Introduction, emphasizing dual significance

function: Preview contributions
template: Основные научные результаты, выносимые на защиту: ___ .
when_to_use: Introduction, listing defended contributions

function: Justify relevance
template: Проблема ___ является одной из ключевых в области ___ .
when_to_use: Introduction, establishing relevance

function: Classify existing approaches
template: Существующие методы ___ можно классифицировать по следующим признакам: ___ .
when_to_use: Literature review, organizing prior work

function: Compare prior approaches
template: В работах [X] и [Y] показано, что ___ , однако ___ .
when_to_use: Literature review, comparing results

function: Identify limitations of prior work
template: Однако в указанных работах не учитывается влияние ___ на ___ .
when_to_use: Literature review, identifying gaps

function: Identify research gap
template: Вопрос о влиянии ___ на ___ остаётся недостаточно изученным.
when_to_use: Literature review, motivating own work
common_mistakes: Gap already addressed in recent literature

function: Position own work
template: Настоящая работа продолжает и развивает исследования в направлении ___ .
when_to_use: Literature review, positioning contribution

function: Justify baseline selection
template: В качестве эталонного метода выбран ___ , поскольку ___ .
when_to_use: Methodology section, justifying comparisons

function: State model assumptions
template: В основе математической модели лежат следующие допущения: ___ .
when_to_use: Model section, listing simplifications

function: Define boundary conditions
template: Граничные условия на поверхности ___ задаются следующим образом: ___ .
when_to_use: Model section, specifying boundaries

function: Introduce notation
template: Обозначим через ___ величину, характеризующую ___ .
when_to_use: Model section, defining variables

function: Justify simplifications
template: При условии ___ уравнение ___ упрощается до вида ___ .
when_to_use: Model section, deriving simplified models

function: Discuss parameter identifiability
template: Параметр ___ определяется из условия ___ и принимает значение ___ .
when_to_use: Model section, discussing parameters

function: State model constraints
template: Модель применима при выполнении условия ___ для ___ .
when_to_use: Model section, defining applicability

function: Describe method pipeline
template: Предлагаемый метод включает следующие этапы: ___ .
when_to_use: Method section, overviewing approach

function: Define method inputs and outputs
template: На вход алгоритма подаётся ___ , на выходе получается ___ .
when_to_use: Method section, specifying I/O

function: Describe algorithmic steps
template: На первом этапе выполняется ___ , затем ___ , после чего ___ .
when_to_use: Method section, detailing procedure

function: Describe parameter settings
template: Значение параметра ___ выбрано равным ___ на основании ___ .
when_to_use: Method section, justifying choices

function: Discuss computational complexity
template: Вычислительная сложность предложенного метода составляет O(___ ) по ___ .
when_to_use: Method section, analyzing efficiency

function: Claim stability conservatively
template: Предложенный алгоритм демонстрирует устойчивое поведение в диапазоне ___ .
when_to_use: Method section, discussing stability

function: Provide implementation details
template: Реализация алгоритма выполнена с использованием ___ , что обеспечивает ___ .
when_to_use: Method section, implementation notes

function: Describe ablation study plan
template: Для оценки вклада ___ проводится серия экспериментов с ___ .
when_to_use: Method or experiment section

function: Describe experimental data
template: Экспериментальные данные получены на установке ___ при следующих условиях: ___ .
when_to_use: Experiment section, describing data

function: Describe experimental scenarios
template: Эксперимент проводился в ___ режимах с варьированием параметра ___ в диапазоне ___ .
when_to_use: Experiment section, describing scenarios

function: Define evaluation metrics
template: Качество моделирования оценивается посредством ___ , рассчитываемого как ___ .
when_to_use: Experiment section, defining metrics

function: Describe data splitting
template: Данные разделены на обучающую ( ___ %) и тестовую ( ___ %) выборки.
when_to_use: Experiment section, data splitting

function: Report hyperparameters
template: Гиперпараметры модели: ___ .
when_to_use: Experiment section, reproducibility

function: Ensure reproducibility
template: Для воспроизведения результатов необходимо ___ при условиях ___ .
when_to_use: Experiment section, reproducibility notes

function: Report statistics
template: Среднее значение ___ составляет ___ ± ___ при доверительной вероятности ___ .
when_to_use: Results section, reporting statistics

function: Announces the high-level structure of the dissertation.
template: Работа состоит из введения, ___, и заключения.
when_to_use: In the introduction to outline the document's organization.
common_mistakes: Listing sections without a clear grammatical link.
Using overly specific section titles in the template.

function: States the main goal of the research.
template: Целью работы является ___.
when_to_use: In the introduction or conclusion to state the overarching aim.
common_mistakes: Making the objective too broad or too narrow.

function: Lists the specific tasks undertaken to achieve the objective.
template: Для достижения поставленной цели решались следующие задачи: ___.
when_to_use: Immediately after the objective in the introduction.
common_mistakes: Listing tasks that are not directly related to the objective.
Using vague verbs like 'study' instead of specific action verbs.

function: Provides a preliminary statement of the work's novel contributions.
template: В работе впервые ___.
when_to_use: Near the end of the introduction to highlight novelty.
common_mistakes: Using this phrase for incremental results.

function: Introduces a classification or typology of existing approaches.
template: Существующие методы ___ можно классифицировать по ___ на ___.
when_to_use: When structuring a literature review around a typology.
common_mistakes: Creating classifications that are not mutually exclusive.
Introducing a taxonomy without explaining its utility.

function: Points out shortcomings in previous research or methods.
template: Недостатком существующих подходов является ___.
when_to_use: To motivate the need for your own work by critiquing prior art.
common_mistakes: Failing to link the limitation to a research gap.

function: Explicitly identifies a gap in knowledge or practice.
template: Вопросы ___ остаются недостаточно изученными.
when_to_use: To clearly state the problem your research addresses.
common_mistakes: Identifying a gap that is too broad.
Not connecting the gap to the stated objective.

function: Describes the general sequence or workflow of a proposed method.
template: Предлагаемая методика включает следующие этапы: ___.
when_to_use: When introducing a new methodological procedure.
common_mistakes: Omitting key steps in the pipeline.
Describing steps at inconsistent levels of detail.

function: Specifies the values or ranges of parameters used in experiments or simulations.
template: В экспериментах параметр ___ задавался равным ___.
when_to_use: In experimental or computational methodology sections to ensure reproducibility.
common_mistakes: Not justifying the choice of parameter values.

function: Provides specifics about the tools, software, or equipment used.
template: Для реализации ___ использовался программный комплекс ___.
when_to_use: To detail the practical execution of a method.
common_mistakes: Listing software without specifying its version or role.
Providing excessive, irrelevant detail about standard equipment.

function: Describes the materials or datasets used in the study.
template: В работе исследовались образцы из стали ___.
when_to_use: In the experimental section to define the subject of study.
common_mistakes: Insufficient characterization of the material/data source.

function: Outlines the specific cases or configurations tested.
template: Проводилось сравнение двух вариантов: ___.
when_to_use: When describing comparative experimental designs.
common_mistakes: Choosing scenarios that do not test the core hypothesis.

function: Introduces the metrics or criteria for evaluating results.
template: Оценка эффективности проводилась по показателям ___.
when_to_use: To define the evaluation criteria for experiments.
common_mistakes: Using non-standard or poorly defined metrics.
Selecting metrics that do not directly measure the phenomenon of interest.

function: Reports quantitative results from experiments or simulations.
template: Значение параметра ___ составило ___ МПа.
when_to_use: To present key numerical findings in the results section.
common_mistakes: Reporting values without units or measurement uncertainty.
Overloading the sentence with too many numbers.

function: Quantifies the improvement achieved by a new method.
template: Применение предлагаемой технологии позволило повысить ___ на ___%.
when_to_use: To highlight the performance gains of your contribution.
common_mistakes: Not specifying the baseline for comparison.
Reporting relative improvement without the absolute values.

function: Provides a plausible physical or logical explanation for an observed result.
template: Наблюдаемое увеличение прочности объясняется ___.
when_to_use: In the discussion to interpret the 'why' behind the data.
common_mistakes: Offering explanations without supporting evidence from the results or literature.
Stating the mechanism as a fact rather than a hypothesis.

function: Discusses the influence of a parameter on the outcome.
template: Результаты в значительной мере зависят от ___.
when_to_use: To analyze which factors are most critical to the process.
common_mistakes: Claiming high sensitivity without quantitative analysis.

function: Describes a compromise between competing objectives.
template: Существует компромисс между ___ и ___.
when_to_use: When results show that improving one aspect worsens another.
common_mistakes: Not suggesting ways to optimize or mitigate it.

function: Summarizes the main findings of the work.
template: В ходе работы было установлено, что ___.
when_to_use: At the beginning of the conclusion section.
common_mistakes: Introducing new information in the summary.
Being too vague or too detailed.

function: Suggests directions for subsequent research.
template: Дальнейшие исследования могут быть направлены на ___.
when_to_use: At the end of the conclusion to open new research horizons.
common_mistakes: Proposing future work that is disconnected from the current findings.
Suggesting trivial or already addressed directions.

function: Introduces a new section or chapter.
template: В настоящей главе представлены ___.
when_to_use: To start a major chapter or section.
common_mistakes: Using a generic opener without previewing the section's content.
Not aligning the opener with the section heading.

function: Identify the core problem addressed in the research.
template: The problem of ___ in the context of ___ is critical for ___.
slots: optimizing milling processes and avoiding chatter
when_to_use: In the introduction to clearly state the research problem.
common_mistakes: Being too vague; not specifying the application context.
Forgetting to link the problem to the practical need.

function: State the main research goal.
template: The objective of this work is to ___ for the purpose of ___.
slots: develop and validate methods for identifying and refining dynamic models
selecting rational and vibration-resistant machining modes
when_to_use: At the end of the introduction to declare the research aim.
common_mistakes: Not connecting the objective back to the problem statement.

function: Outline the structure of the dissertation.
template: The thesis is structured as follows: Chapter 1 reviews ___. Chapter 2 describes ___. Chapter 3 presents ___. Chapter 4 focuses on ___.
slots: prior art and establishes the research gap
when_to_use: At the very end of the introduction to guide the reader.
common_mistakes: Simply listing chapter titles without explaining their logical flow.

function: Categorize existing approaches.
template: Existing methods for ___ can be broadly classified into ___ and ___ approaches.
when_to_use: In a literature review to organize prior work into groups.

function: Point out weaknesses in previous studies.
template: A significant limitation of prior work on ___ is the lack of ___.
when_to_use: When critiquing the existing literature to highlight shortcomings.

function: Identify the research gap.
template: Therefore, a gap exists in the development of ___ that can be applied to ___.
when_to_use: To justify the need for the current research.
common_mistakes: Stating a gap that is already well-covered in literature.

function: Position the current work relative to others.
template: This work extends prior research by ___ and differs from ___ in that ___.
slots: it performs online identification during the process
when_to_use: To clearly define the novelty and contribution of the proposed work.
common_mistakes: Failing to explicitly state what is new.

function: State the key modeling assumptions.
template: The dynamic model of ___ assumes ___ and ___.
slots: a fixed number of dominant modes
when_to_use: When introducing a mathematical or computational model.

function: Discuss which parameters can be identified.
template: Sensitivity analysis shows that the parameters with the highest influence on ___ are ___.
slots: the modulus of elasticity and boundary stiffness
when_to_use: When explaining the choice of parameters for updating.
common_mistakes: Not performing or referring to a prior sensitivity analysis.

function: Justify a modeling simplification.
template: For the purpose of ___, the model is simplified by ___.
slots: reducing the finite element mesh density in non-critical regions
when_to_use: To explain a choice that makes the model tractable.
common_mistakes: Oversimplifying to the point where the model becomes inaccurate.

function: Provide a high-level overview of a methodology.
template: The proposed methodology comprises three main stages: ___, ___, and ___.
when_to_use: At the beginning of a methods chapter to give an overview.
common_mistakes: Providing excessive detail in the overview.

function: Describe the steps of an algorithm.
template: The identification algorithm proceeds as follows: first, ___; second, ___; finally, ___.
slots: the frequency response functions are measured
the modal parameters are extracted using SSI
the results are compared and averaged
when_to_use: To detail a procedural algorithm in a clear, step-by-step manner.
common_mistakes: Presenting steps in a non-logical order.

function: Give practical details of implementation.
template: The method was implemented in ___ using ___.
slots: MATLAB and the LabVIEW data acquisition platform
when_to_use: To provide necessary details for reproducibility.
common_mistakes: Not specifying software or key hardware used.

function: Describe the experimental data.
template: The experimental data consists of ___ recorded from ___ under ___.
slots: impact hammer tests on the workpiece
when_to_use: To introduce the dataset used for validation or testing.

function: Describe an experimental scenario.
template: To assess ___, a test scenario was designed where ___ while ___.
slots: the depth of cut was held constant
when_to_use: To explain the setup of a specific test or experiment.
common_mistakes: Not explaining the rationale behind the scenario design.

function: Define the evaluation metrics.
template: The accuracy of the model updating was evaluated using the metric ___, defined as ___.
slots: the correlation between experimental and analytical mode shapes
when_to_use: To define how results will be measured and compared.
common_mistakes: Using metrics that are not standard or well-defined.

function: Report a numerical result.
template: The updated model achieved a frequency prediction error of ___ for the ___ mode.
when_to_use: To present a specific, quantitative finding.
common_mistakes: Reporting results without units or context.

function: Report an improvement over a baseline.
template: Compared to the initial FE model, the refinement procedure reduced the discrepancy in ___ by ___%.
when_to_use: To highlight the effectiveness of the proposed method.
common_mistakes: Exaggerating improvements without proper statistical support.

function: Explain the underlying reason for an observed result.
template: The improvement in accuracy is primarily attributed to the incorporation of ___.
slots: process-dependent boundary conditions identified from operational data
when_to_use: To interpret a result and explain why it occurred.
common_mistakes: Stating correlation as causation without evidence.

function: Discuss the sensitivity of the results.
template: The results are highly sensitive to ___, but relatively robust to ___.
slots: the initial guess of stiffness parameters
when_to_use: To analyze the robustness and reliability of findings.

function: Describe a trade-off in the approach.
template: There is a clear trade-off between ___ and ___ in the proposed method.
when_to_use: To present a balanced view of the method's characteristics.

function: Summarize the main findings.
template: This thesis has demonstrated that ___ can be effectively achieved through ___.
slots: accurate dynamic modeling of milled parts
an integrated experimental and computational framework
when_to_use: At the beginning of the conclusion chapter.

function: 陈述研究的核心问题领域。
template: The problem of ___ in the domain of ___ remains challenging due to ___.
when_to_use: 在引言开头，界定研究范围和关键障碍时使用。
common_mistakes: 问题描述过于宽泛，未聚焦具体挑战
缺少导致问题难以解决的因果解释

function: 明确阐述论文的主要研究目标。
template: The primary objective of this work is to develop a method for ___.
when_to_use: 在引言中明确提出论文要达成的具体目标时。
common_mistakes: 目标表述为空洞的愿景而非具体的技术任务

function: 概述为实现主要目标而需完成的具体子任务。
template: To achieve this, the following tasks are addressed: (1) ___, (2) ___.
when_to_use: 在引言末尾，将总目标分解为可执行的研究步骤时。
common_mistakes: 任务清单与论文结构（章节）不对应

function: 预览论文的主要贡献。
template: The key contributions of this work are: (i) a novel framework for ___, and (ii) an extensive empirical evaluation on ___.
when_to_use: 在引言中总结创新点和价值时。
common_mistakes: 贡献描述与后文实际内容不符

function: 对现有工作进行分类概述。
template: Existing approaches can be broadly categorized into ___ methods and ___ methods.
when_to_use: 在文献综述开始，建立分类框架时。
common_mistakes: 分类标准不明确或交叉
分类未覆盖所有重要工作

function: 指出先前工作的局限性。
template: However, these methods often suffer from ___, limiting their applicability to ___.
when_to_use: 在综述具体方法后，分析其不足时。
common_mistakes: 批评缺乏依据或过于主观
未能将局限性与本文要解决的问题联系起来

function: 明确指出研究领域的空白。
template: A gap remains in the development of methods that can simultaneously ___ and ___.
when_to_use: 在综述结尾，引出本文研究必要性时。
common_mistakes: 指出的空白实际上已被部分研究
空白描述与本文工作不匹配

function: 引入关键符号或数学记号。
template: Let X denote the matrix of ___, where each row corresponds to ___.
when_to_use: 在数学建模或问题公式化章节开始时。
common_mistakes: 符号定义不清晰或后续未统一使用
引入过多不必要的符号

function: 概述方法的总体流程。
template: The proposed pipeline consists of three main stages: feature extraction via ___, followed by ___, and finally classification using ___.
when_to_use: 在方法章节开头，描述系统整体架构时。
common_mistakes: 流程描述过于简略，缺少关键步骤
各阶段之间逻辑关系不清

function: 描述算法或方法的关键步骤。
template: The algorithm iterates as follows: Step 1: initialize ___. Step 2: repeat until convergence by ___.
when_to_use: 在详细描述一个算法的具体执行过程时。
common_mistakes: 步骤描述跳跃，缺少关键计算细节

function: 描述实验所用数据集。
template: The experiments were conducted on the publicly available ___, which contains ___ recordings from ___ subjects.
when_to_use: 在实验设置部分，介绍数据来源和基本信息时。
common_mistakes: 缺少数据获取途径或预处理说明
信息不完整（如缺少被试信息）

function: 报告性能的提升。
template: The proposed method achieves a ___% improvement in ___ over the baseline ___.
when_to_use: 在结果部分，用具体数字对比展示优势时。
common_mistakes: 未指定基线方法，比较不明确
仅报告相对提升，未给出绝对数值

function: 对结果进行谨慎的解释。
template: This suggests that the improvement may be attributed to the ability of our method to ___.
when_to_use: 在讨论部分，对观察到的结果进行推断性解释时。
common_mistakes: 解释过于武断，缺乏证据支持

function: 总结论文的核心工作。
template: In this work, we have addressed the problem of ___ by proposing ___.
when_to_use: 在结论章节开头，概括全文主旨时。
common_mistakes: 简单重复摘要内容，无深度

function: 展望未来的研究方向。
template: Future work will focus on extending the framework to ___ and investigating ___.
when_to_use: 在结论末尾，提出下一步计划时。
common_mistakes: 展望过于空泛，与当前工作无关
忽略当前工作的局限性

function: 开启新的章节。
template: Chapter N presents the proposed methodology for ___.
when_to_use: 在每个章节（如第2、3章）的起始段。
common_mistakes: 过于机械，如直接写‘第二章。’
与前一章结尾缺乏衔接

function: 给出一个正式的数学或概念定义。
template: A feature space F is defined as the set of all vectors x ∈ ℝ^d that satisfy ___.
when_to_use: 在引入新概念或术语时，需要形式化定义。
common_mistakes: 定义过于复杂，难以理解
定义与后续使用不一致

function: 对比不同研究或方法的特点。
template: Compared to {A}, the method proposed by {B} explicitly addresses ___ but at the cost of ___.
when_to_use: 在文献综述中，对几种核心方法进行横向对比时。

function: State research motivation in engineering context
template: Повышение эффективности процесса ___ является актуальной задачей ___
when_to_use: Opening motivation paragraphs

function: Justify industrial relevance
template: Актуальность работы обусловлена необходимостью ___ для повышения качества ___
when_to_use: Relevance justification sections

function: Formulate engineering problem
template: Существующие методы ___ не позволяют достаточно точно учитывать влияние ___ на ___
when_to_use: Problem statement in introduction

function: State dissertation objective
template: Целью работы является разработка методики ___ на основе ___
when_to_use: Objective declaration in introduction

function: List research tasks
template: Для достижения поставленной цели решались следующие задачи: ___
when_to_use: Task enumeration in introduction

function: Describe thesis structure
template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы
when_to_use: Thesis structure overview

function: Preview main contributions
template: Основные научные результаты работы заключаются в следующем: ___
when_to_use: Contribution preview in introduction

function: Classify approaches in literature
template: Известные подходы к моделированию ___ можно разделить на следующие группы: ___
when_to_use: Literature taxonomy paragraphs

function: Identify limitations of prior work
template: Ограничением данного подхода является ___
when_to_use: Gap identification in survey

function: Compare modeling approaches
template: В отличие от ___ подхода, ___ метод позволяет учитывать ___
when_to_use: Comparative analysis paragraphs

function: Identify research gap
template: В существующих работах недостаточно внимания уделено влиянию ___ на ___
when_to_use: Gap statement in literature review

function: Position own research
template: Настоящая работа развивает ___ подход, дополняя его учётом ___
when_to_use: Research positioning paragraphs

function: Justify baseline model selection
template: В качестве базовой модели принята модель ___
when_to_use: Baseline justification

function: State model assumptions
template: При построении модели приняты следующие допущения: ___
when_to_use: Model assumptions sections

function: Define boundary conditions
template: Граничные условия модели задаются следующим образом: ___
when_to_use: Model boundary condition descriptions

function: Describe model simplifications
template: Для упрощения расчёта предполагается, что ___
when_to_use: Model simplification explanations

function: Introduce model notation
template: Обозначим через ___ величину ___
when_to_use: Notation introduction paragraphs

function: State model constraints
template: Модель применима при условии, что ___
slots: величина подачи не превышает критического значения
when_to_use: Model applicability statements

function: Discuss model uncertainties
template: Основной источник неопределённости модели связан с ___
when_to_use: Uncertainty discussion in model sections

function: Discuss parameter identifiability
template: Параметры модели ___ определяются на основе экспериментальных данных ___
when_to_use: Parameter identification sections

function: Describe methodological pipeline
template: Методика расчёта включает следующие этапы: ___
slots: моделирование зерна, генерация поверхности, расчёт сил
when_to_use: Method overview sections

function: Define method inputs and outputs
template: На входе модели задаются параметры: ___, на выходе определяется ___
when_to_use: Input-output specification
common_mistakes: Outputs not clearly linked to inputs

function: Describe algorithmic steps
template: Алгоритм расчёта реализуется в следующей последовательности: 1) ___; 2) ___; 3) ___
when_to_use: Algorithm description paragraphs

function: Explain parameter settings
template: Значение параметра ___ принято равным ___ на основании ___
when_to_use: Parameter justification sections

function: Discuss computational complexity
template: Вычислительные затраты модели составляют ___ при использовании ___
when_to_use: Computational cost discussions

function: Describe implementation details
template: Реализация модели выполнена в программном комплексе ___
when_to_use: Implementation detail sections

function: State stability claims conservatively
template: Устойчивость решения обеспечивается при условии соблюдения ___
when_to_use: Numerical stability discussions

function: Describe experimental data
template: Экспериментальные данные получены при ___ условиях обработки с использованием ___
when_to_use: Data description sections

function: Design computational scenarios
template: Для исследования влияния ___ на ___ были рассмотрены следующие варианты: ___
when_to_use: Scenario design descriptions
common_mistakes: Scenarios not covering full parameter range

function: Define evaluation metrics
template: В качестве критерия оценки ___ используется величина ___
when_to_use: Metrics definition paragraphs

function: Define experimental baselines
template: Для валидации результаты модели сравниваются с данными ___
when_to_use: Baseline comparison setup

function: Specify computational hyperparameters
template: Параметры сетки МКЭ выбраны на основании анализа ___
when_to_use: Mesh/parameter sensitivity sections

function: Report numerical results
template: Максимальное значение ___ составило ___ при ___
when_to_use: Numerical result reporting

function: Report improvement over baseline
template: Предложенная модель позволяет снизить погрешность расчёта ___ на ___ по сравнению с ___
when_to_use: Improvement statement paragraphs

function: Report statistical distributions
template: Распределение ___ имеет вид ___ с параметрами ___
when_to_use: Distribution reporting in stochastic sections

function: Present comparison in table form
template: Сравнение результатов расчёта и эксперимента представлено в таблице ___
when_to_use: Table reference paragraphs

function: State the motivation for studying rover navigation
template: The autonomous navigation of ___ is motivated by the need for ___ in ___ environments.
when_to_use: Opening the introduction to justify the research area
common_mistakes: Too vague without specifying the target platform

function: Link the work to broader scientific field
template: This research falls within the field of ___ and addresses the problem of ___.
when_to_use: Positioning the thesis within a scientific specialty
common_mistakes: Listing too many fields without clear connection

function: Formulate the central research problem
template: The core problem addressed in this work is the development of ___ for ___ under conditions of ___.
when_to_use: Stating the thesis problem in the introduction
common_mistakes: Problem too broad or not measurable

function: State the research objective
template: The objective of this work is to develop and validate ___ that improves ___ for ___.
when_to_use: After problem statement to declare what will be achieved
common_mistakes: Objective not aligned with problem statement

function: Enumerate research tasks
template: To achieve this objective, the following tasks are addressed: (1) ___, (2) ___, (3) ___.
when_to_use: Decomposing the objective into concrete steps
common_mistakes: Tasks that overlap or are not sequential

function: Preview main contributions
template: The main contributions of this work include: (i) ___, (ii) ___, and (iii) ___.
when_to_use: End of introduction to highlight novelty
common_mistakes: Contributions not distinguished from existing methods

function: Describe the thesis organization
template: This thesis is organized as follows: Chapter 1 presents ___, Chapter 2 describes ___, Chapter 3 introduces ___.
when_to_use: End of introduction to guide the reader
common_mistakes: Too detailed chapter summaries that duplicate the text

function: Classify existing approaches
template: Existing approaches to ___ can be classified into the following categories: ___, ___, and ___.
when_to_use: Opening a literature review section

function: Compare two approaches in the literature
template: Unlike ___ which assumes ___, the method of ___ relies on ___ and therefore ___.
when_to_use: Contrasting two methods in a survey section

function: Identify limitations of prior work
template: A limitation of ___ is that it requires ___ and is sensitive to ___.
when_to_use: Motivating the gap before proposing a new method

function: Identify a research gap
template: Despite progress in ___, the problem of ___ in ___ remains insufficiently addressed.
when_to_use: Transitioning from literature review to proposed work
common_mistakes: Gap too vague or already addressed in recent work

function: Position the proposed work relative to existing methods
template: The proposed approach differs from ___ in that it employs ___ rather than ___.
when_to_use: After gap identification to introduce novelty

function: Justify baseline selection
template: The baseline ___ is selected for comparison because it represents the state of the art in ___ and is compatible with ___.
when_to_use: Choosing baselines in experimental design

function: State modeling assumptions
template: We assume that ___ follows a ___ distribution with parameters ___.
when_to_use: Introducing a probabilistic model

function: Specify boundary conditions of the model
template: The model is valid under the boundary condition that ___ remains within ___.
when_to_use: Defining the operating envelope

function: Introduce notation
template: Let ___ denote the ___ of the ___ at time ___.
when_to_use: Formal definition of variables in a mathematical model

function: Define coordinate frames
template: We define the ___ frame {___} with origin at ___ and axes aligned with ___.
when_to_use: Establishing reference frames in robotics

function: State model simplifications
template: For computational tractability, we simplify ___ by replacing ___ with ___.
when_to_use: Justifying a reduced-complexity model
common_mistakes: Simplification not justified by error analysis

function: Describe the overall pipeline
template: The proposed pipeline consists of three stages: ___, ___, and ___.
when_to_use: Opening a method chapter with a high-level view
common_mistakes: Stages presented without data flow description

function: Define inputs and outputs of the algorithm
template: The algorithm takes ___ as input and produces ___ as output.
when_to_use: Specifying the interface of a proposed algorithm
common_mistakes: Not specifying data types or formats

function: Enumerate algorithm steps
template: The algorithm proceeds as follows: Step 1: ___. Step 2: ___. Step 3: ___.
when_to_use: Describing a multi-step procedure
common_mistakes: Steps too abstract or missing termination condition

function: Describe how parameters are set
template: The parameter ___ is set to ___ based on ___ / determined by ___.
when_to_use: Explaining hyperparameter choices

function: Analyze computational complexity
template: The time complexity of ___ is ___ with respect to ___, yielding a total cost of ___.
when_to_use: Justifying scalability of the proposed method
common_mistakes: Ignoring constant factors or memory costs

function: Make conservative stability claims
template: Under the assumption that ___, the proposed filter is expected to remain numerically stable for ___.
when_to_use: Claiming stability with appropriate hedging

function: Describe implementation specifics
template: The implementation uses ___ with ___ configured to ___ on ___ hardware.
when_to_use: Providing reproducibility details
common_mistakes: Omitting software versions or hardware specs

function: Plan ablation study
template: To assess the contribution of ___, we compare the full system against a variant where ___ is replaced by ___.
when_to_use: Designing ablation experiments
common_mistakes: Only removing one component at a time without interaction effects

function: Describe experimental scenarios
template: Experiments are conducted in ___ scenarios representing ___, ___, and ___ conditions.
when_to_use: Describing test environments
common_mistakes: Scenarios not representative of real deployment

function: Define evaluation metrics
template: Performance is evaluated using ___ (measuring ___), ___ (measuring ___), and ___ (measuring ___).
when_to_use: Specifying how results will be quantified
common_mistakes: Metrics not aligned with stated objectives

function: Ensure reproducibility
template: All experiments are reproducible with the code available at ___ and random seed set to ___.
when_to_use: Addressing reproducibility concerns
common_mistakes: Not providing code or data access

function: Report numerical results
template: The proposed method achieves ___ of ___ on ___, compared to ___ for the baseline ___.
when_to_use: Reporting main experimental results

function: Report improvement over baseline
template: Compared to ___, the proposed approach reduces ___ by ___% while maintaining ___.
when_to_use: Highlighting gains over prior work

function: Report distribution of results
template: The distribution of ___ has a mean of ___ and standard deviation of ___ across ___ trials.
when_to_use: Reporting statistical summaries

function: Present a detailed case study
template: In the ___ scenario, the proposed method correctly ___ while the baseline fails to ___.
when_to_use: Illustrating qualitative advantages

function: Describe failure cases
template: The method fails when ___ exceeds ___, resulting in ___.
when_to_use: Honest reporting of limitations
common_mistakes: Burying failure cases in supplementary material

function: Explain why the method works
template: The improvement stems from ___ which allows ___ to ___ more effectively.
when_to_use: Interpreting experimental results
common_mistakes: Post-hoc explanations not supported by ablation

function: State the core research focus of the dissertation
template: This dissertation focuses on developing ___ for ___.
slots: controlling a group of dynamic objects
when_to_use: Opening paragraph of the introduction to establish the research topic.
common_mistakes: Being too vague; specifying the group type (e.g., dynamic objects) is key.
Forgetting to state the application domain (control).

function: Formally state the primary problem under investigation
template: This work considers the problem of ___ with ___.
slots: moving a homogeneous group of objects from initial to terminal states
the absence of environment information and communication
when_to_use: In the introduction to define the specific challenge addressed.
common_mistakes: Missing the key constraints (no info, no comms) that define the problem's difficulty.
Using overly technical jargon without explanation.

function: Declare the specific aim or goal of the research
template: The primary objective of this research is to ___.
slots: synthesize control for a group of objects satisfying dynamic phase constraints
when_to_use: To clearly state what the research aims to achieve.
common_mistakes: Using vague verbs like 'study' or 'explore'. Objective should be an action like 'synthesize', 'develop', 'propose'.

function: Introduce a classification of existing approaches
template: Existing approaches to ___ can be classified based on ___.
slots: control of object groups with phase constraints
the moment of optimal control search
when_to_use: In a literature review to structure the discussion of prior work.
common_mistakes: The chosen classification axis (moment of search) may not be the most common one; justify it.

function: Describe a comparative analysis between methods
template: A comparative analysis of ___ and ___ methods is performed to assess ___.
slots: their suitability for the given problem
when_to_use: When evaluating different methodological families from the literature.
common_mistakes: Not specifying the evaluation criteria in the comparison.

function: Define the specific conditions or limitations of the problem context
template: The problem is considered under the condition that ___.
slots: the environment is unknown and agents cannot communicate
when_to_use: When stating assumptions that bound the scope of the model or problem.
common_mistakes: Listing too many conditions at once; they should be stated clearly and individually.

function: Describe the high-level stages of a proposed method
template: The proposed system for ___ consists of ___ and ___.
when_to_use: To give an overview of a multi-stage algorithm or system architecture.
common_mistakes: The description is too abstract; mentioning key components like 'neural networks' adds value.

function: Outline a specific step in an algorithmic procedure
template: In this stage, the ___ is synthesized/approximated using ___.
when_to_use: Describing a step in a methodology chapter, e.g., training a model.
common_mistakes: The verb ('synthesized') should match the algorithmic action.

function: State the purpose of the computational experiments
template: Computational experiments are conducted to evaluate the ___ of the proposed ___ in ___.
when_to_use: Introducing the experimental validation section.
common_mistakes: Forgetting to state what is being evaluated (performance, effectiveness).

function: Present a quantitative outcome from experiments
template: The experiments show that the proposed method achieves ___ with a ___ of ___.
when_to_use: Reporting key quantitative results from experiments.
common_mistakes: Reporting only vague success without numbers.

function: Explain why a proposed method works based on an identified mechanism
template: The effectiveness of the method is attributed to its ability to ___.
slots: dynamically modify the right-hand sides of differential equations
when_to_use: To provide a rationale for observed results in a discussion section.
common_mistakes: Making a claim without linking it to a specific feature of the method.

function: Summarize the main contribution or outcome of the work
template: In summary, this work contributes to ___ by proposing ___.
slots: a set of methods and algorithms for collision avoidance
when_to_use: The opening sentence of the general conclusions chapter.
common_mistakes: Rephrasing the objective; conclusion should state what was achieved.

function: Introduce the next major chapter or section
template: The next chapter is devoted to ___.
slots: the problem statement for group control
when_to_use: At the end of an introduction or preceding chapter.
common_mistakes: Being too abrupt; a brief link to the current topic is better.

function: Define the notation for a key element in the model
template: Let ___ denote the group of dynamic objects.
when_to_use: When introducing the primary notational symbol for the system under study.
common_mistakes: Using multiple symbols for the same concept.

function: Outline the organization of the dissertation document
template: The dissertation consists of an introduction, {X} chapters, and conclusions.
when_to_use: Towards the end of the introduction to guide the reader.
common_mistakes: Being overly detailed about section content in the structure outline.

function: Describe a key component used in the implementation
template: The proposed block for ___ is implemented using ___.
when_to_use: To specify the core technical method or tool employed.
common_mistakes: Not linking the implementation detail back to the problem requirement.

function: Characterize the system or data used for simulation
template: The system is modeled as a group of ___ moving in ___.
when_to_use: To describe the experimental setup or simulation environment.
common_mistakes: Assuming the reader knows the specifics of the testbed.

function: Acknowledge scenarios where the method has limitations
template: The method encounters difficulties when ___ is severely ___.
when_to_use: To present a balanced view of results, acknowledging boundaries.
common_mistakes: Burying failures; they should be discussed to build credibility.

function: 陈述研究问题的紧迫性或重要性
template: Одной из наиболее сложных проблем при разработке ___ является обеспечение эффективной защиты/анализа/моделирования ___ от воздействия ___/с учетом ___.
when_to_use: Во введении для обоснования актуальности исследования, описания основной сложности области.
common_mistakes: Использование слишком абстрактных терминов вместо конкретных факторов.
Перегруженность предложения деталями, не относящимися к мотивации.

function: Классификация существующих моделей или подходов
template: Математические модели для анализа ___ можно разделить на ___ (на основе эффективных характеристик) и ___ (с учетом микроструктуры).
when_to_use: В обзоре литературы для систематизации предшествующих работ.
common_mistakes: Необоснованное дихотомное деление, когда существует больше классов.

function: Описание граничных условий модели
template: Граничные условия на поверхности задаются с учетом ___ (например, конвективного теплообмена, массового отвода, радиационного излучения).
when_to_use: При описании постановки задачи для математической модели.
common_mistakes: Указание общих типов условий без связи с конкретной физической ситуацией.

function: Обзор алгоритма или методологического подхода
template: Предлагаемый подход включает следующие этапы: (1) выбор представительного элемента объема (ПЭО), (2) задание условий моделирования, (3) проведение расчетов, (4) анализ и усреднение результатов.
when_to_use: В разделе, посвященном разработке алгоритма или методики.

function: Описание экспериментальных образцов или данных
template: Для экспериментальных исследований были использованы образцы из ___ (напр., пористых углерод-керамических композиционных материалов) с размерами ___ и структурой ___.
when_to_use: При описании лабораторных или стендовых испытаний.
common_mistakes: Недостаточно детальное описание параметров образцов, влияющих на воспроизводимость.

function: Представление численных результатов моделирования или измерений
template: Согласно результатам расчетов, значение эффективной ___ (напр., теплопроводности) составляет ___ [ед. изм.] при температуре ___ [К].
when_to_use: В разделе с результатами для однозначного сообщения полученных данных.
common_mistakes: Предоставление только средних значений без указания диапазона или ошибки.

function: Интерпретация наблюдаемого эффекта или результата
template: Наблюдаемое уменьшение/увеличение ___ может быть объяснено доминированием механизма ___ в условиях ___.
when_to_use: При анализе и обсуждении полученных результатов, выявлении причинно-следственных связей.
common_mistakes: Интерпретация без подтверждения другими данными (расчетами, экспериментами).
Использование неопределенного языка там, где уместно однозначное утверждение.

function: Резюме ключевых вкладов работы
template: В работе ___ (напр., разработана и верифицирована) математическая модель, позволяющая ___ (напр., рассчитывать прогрев и деструкцию) с учетом ___.
when_to_use: В заключении для четкого перечисления основных результатов.
common_mistakes: Повторение формулировки задачи вместо описания полученного решения.

function: Введение нового раздела или параграфа
template: В настоящем разделе ___ (напр. подробно рассмотрены) результаты ___ (напр. лабораторных исследований) свойств ___.
when_to_use: В начале новой главы или крупного параграфа для структурирования текста.
common_mistakes: Использование одних и тех же переходных фраз во всех разделах.
Отсутствие ссылки на конкретное содержание раздела.

function: Введение определения нового термина или понятия
template: Под ___ (напр., представительным элементом объема) понимается наименьший элемент структуры, ___ (напр., статистически репрезентативный для описания макросвойств).
when_to_use: При введении ключевых понятий, используемых далее в тексте.
common_mistakes: Отсутствие указания на необходимость данного определения для работы.

function: Описание практической реализации или применения
template: Разработанный программный комплекс ___ (напр., может быть интегрирован) в пакеты ___ (напр., конечно-элементного анализа) для ___ (напр., проектирования теплозащитных покрытий).
when_to_use: В разделе с практическими рекомендациями или описании программной реализации.
common_mistakes: Отсутствие информации о системных требованиях или ограничениях.
Слишком абстрактное описание без конкретных примеров использования.

function: To frame the research topic within a broader context of challenges.
template: The study of ___ is driven by the pressing need to address the challenges of ___.
when_to_use: At the beginning of an introduction to establish the practical urgency of the research topic.
common_mistakes: Using overly generic challenges not specific to the research problem.
Failing to link the challenge directly to the studied phenomenon.

function: To articulate the core research problem or gap.
template: A critical issue in the context of ___ is the lack of a comprehensive methodology for ___.
when_to_use: To state the central problem that the thesis aims to solve.
common_mistakes: Stating a problem that is too broad or not solvable by the research.
Mistaking a symptom for the core problem.

function: To state the primary aim of the research.
template: The primary objective of this work is to develop a methodology for ___.
when_to_use: To concisely declare what the dissertation seeks to achieve.
common_mistakes: Using vague verbs like 'to study' or 'to analyze' instead of precise verbs like 'to develop', 'to propose', 'to evaluate'.

function: To classify prior works or approaches into defined groups.
template: Prior research on ___ can be systematically categorized into three main approaches: ___, ___, and ___.
when_to_use: When reviewing the literature to organize existing knowledge and identify patterns.
common_mistakes: Creating an arbitrary or overlapping classification.
Not defining the basis (criteria) for the classification.

function: To critique or identify shortcomings in existing studies or methods.
template: Existing models for ___ often overlook the critical factor of ___, limiting their applicability.
when_to_use: To justify the need for new research by highlighting gaps or weaknesses in the current state of the art.
common_mistakes: Being unfairly dismissive of prior work without evidence.

function: To explicitly state the gap the thesis intends to fill.
template: This reveals a gap in the literature concerning the integration of ___ with ___.
when_to_use: After reviewing limitations to pinpoint the specific missing piece your research addresses.
common_mistakes: Claiming a gap that is not supported by the preceding literature review.
Stating a gap that is too broad to be addressed in a single thesis.

function: To declare the foundational assumptions of the proposed model or framework.
template: The proposed model operates under the key assumption that ___ can be quantified by ___.
when_to_use: In the methodology chapter to set boundaries and ensure transparency about the model's starting points.
common_mistakes: Stating assumptions that are unrealistic or not adhered to in the model.

function: To discuss how model parameters are determined or estimated.
template: The parameter ___ within the profit model is identified based on ___ from historical data.
when_to_use: When explaining how abstract model components are connected to real-world data.
common_mistakes: Using parameters that cannot be observed or estimated in practice.
Failing to justify the chosen method for parameter identification.

function: To provide a high-level summary of the proposed method's stages.
template: The methodology comprises four sequential stages: 1) ___, 2) ___, 3) ___, and 4) ___.
when_to_use: At the beginning of the methodology chapter to give the reader a roadmap.
common_mistakes: Listing stages in a non-logical order.
Being too vague about what each stage entails.

function: To discuss the computational or operational complexity of a method.
template: While the simulation approach is flexible, its computational complexity increases with ___.
slots: the number of modeled market scenarios
when_to_use: To honestly address the limitations and resource requirements of the proposed approach.
common_mistakes: Overstating the simplicity of a complex method.

function: To characterize the dataset used for testing or application.
template: The empirical analysis is based on financial and operational data from ___ industrial enterprises.
when_to_use: To describe the source, scope, and nature of the data used in the research.
common_mistakes: Providing insufficient detail on data sources and time period.
Not discussing data quality or preprocessing steps.

function: To define the criteria or measures used to evaluate performance.
template: Effectiveness of the diversification strategy is measured using ___ and ___.
when_to_use: To specify what 'success' or 'performance' means in the context of the research.
common_mistakes: Using too many metrics without clear prioritization.
Choosing metrics that are not directly aligned with the research objectives.

function: To present quantitative findings from experiments or analysis.
template: The modeling results indicate that implementing the proposed strategy could lead to a ___ % increase in ___.
when_to_use: To convey specific numerical outcomes clearly and objectively.
common_mistakes: Reporting results without sufficient context (e.g., baseline).

function: To systematically compare different options or scenarios.
template: A comparative analysis of diversification paths A and B reveals that Path A is superior in terms of ___, while Path B excels in ___.
when_to_use: To present structured comparisons that support decision-making or conclusions.
common_mistakes: Failing to highlight the key differentiating factors.

function: To explain the 'why' behind an observed result or phenomenon.
template: The observed correlation between ___ and ___ can be attributed to the mechanism of ___.
when_to_use: To go beyond describing what happened to explaining why it happened, based on the research framework.
common_mistakes: Offering explanations that are not supported by the data or model.
Confusing correlation with causation without justification.

function: To reiterate the key scholarly or practical contributions of the work.
template: The main contribution of this dissertation is the developed methodology that enables ___.
slots: strategic planning of industrial diversification based on quantitative modeling
when_to_use: In the conclusion to summarize the novelty and value of the completed work.
common_mistakes: Being too modest or too boastful about the contributions.

function: To suggest directions for subsequent research.
template: Future research should focus on extending the model to incorporate ___ and testing it in ___.
when_to_use: To provide a forward-looking perspective and acknowledge the study's boundaries.
common_mistakes: Suggesting trivial or impossible future work.
Presenting future work that merely repeats the current study's limitations.

function: To logically introduce a new chapter or major section.
template: Having established the theoretical foundations, the following chapter addresses the ___ aspects of ___.
when_to_use: At the start of a new chapter to connect it to the preceding content and preview its focus.
common_mistakes: Abruptly starting a new section without linking it to the previous one.
Using a generic opener that could apply to any section.

function: 概述论文的章节结构及各章核心内容。
template: Во введении обоснована актуальность... Глава 1 посвящена ___。Глава 2 анализирует ___。Глава 3 исследует ___。В заключении ___。
when_to_use: 在引言结尾部分，为读者提供论文的路线图。
common_mistakes: 章节描述过于简略，未点明核心分析视角；结构描述与实际章节标题完全重复，缺乏概括。

function: 列举为实现研究目标所需完成的具体子任务。
template: Для достижения данной цели поставлены следующие задачи: 1) ___; 2) ___; 3) ___; 4) ___.
when_to_use: 在引言或单独的‘任务’章节，将总目标分解为可操作的研究步骤。
common_mistakes: 任务描述与研究目标或章节内容不对应；任务表述为状态而非行动（如‘研究X’而非‘分析X的特性’）。

function: 陈述研究要解决的核心问题
template: The central problem addressed is the ___ of metaheuristic algorithms with the ___ architecture.
when_to_use: 在引言或摘要中，清晰界定研究问题的核心对象与挑战。
common_mistakes: 问题描述过于宽泛，未限定具体对象与背景。

function: 声明论文的主要研究目标
template: This thesis aims to develop methods and models for the ___ of ___ with ___ architecture.
when_to_use: 在引言末尾或专门陈述目标的段落开头。
common_mistakes: 目标与问题陈述区分不清，或过于技术化难以理解。

function: 列出为实现目标所需完成的具体研究任务
template: To achieve this objective, the following tasks are addressed: 1) to develop ___ for GPU; 2) to create a ___ model for algorithms; 3) to design ___ methods.
when_to_use: 在引言中，将大目标分解为具体、可验证的子任务。
common_mistakes: 任务描述过于模糊，或与后续章节内容脱节。

function: 预览论文的主要理论或方法贡献
template: The main contributions of this work are the proposed ___ model and the ___ coordination method.
when_to_use: 在引言末尾，向读者快速展示工作的核心价值。
common_mistakes: 贡献陈述不具体，或与论文实际内容不匹配。

function: 概述论文的结构安排
template: The thesis is structured as follows: Chapter ___ presents the problem statement and a literature survey. Chapter ___ details the development of models. Chapter ___ describes the coordination methods.
when_to_use: 在引言的最后一段，引导读者阅读。
common_mistakes: 结构描述与实际章节标题或内容不一致。

function: 对现有方法进行分类介绍
template: Methods for ___ can be classified into ___ and ___ categories.
when_to_use: 在文献综述中，对某一技术领域的方法进行系统分类。
common_mistakes: 分类标准不清晰或类别之间存在重叠。

function: 对不同算法或方法进行比较
template: Unlike evolutionary algorithms, behavioral algorithms typically ___ by ___.
when_to_use: 在综述中对比不同类别技术的特征差异。
common_mistakes: 比较流于表面，未深入分析本质差异。
slots: operate based on swarm intelligence principles

function: 指出现有研究的不足之处
template: A key limitation of prior approaches is the lack of a formal model for the ___ between algorithm and ___.
when_to_use: 在综述末尾，引出自己研究的必要性。
common_mistakes: 批评过于笼统，未指出具体的技术空白。

function: 明确研究空白
template: This highlights the need for a systematic approach to the ___ of algorithms with ___.
when_to_use: 基于文献分析，明确指出研究机会。
common_mistakes: 研究空白界定不清，与现有工作区分度不够。

function: 陈述建模的基本假设
template: The model assumes that the ___ of the GPU can be represented as a ___.
when_to_use: 在介绍数学模型之初，明确模型的简化前提。
common_mistakes: 假设不合理或过于理想化，导致模型脱离实际。

function: 定义模型的适用范围
template: The proposed model is applicable to GPU architectures with a ___.
when_to_use: 在模型描述部分，限定其应用条件。
common_mistakes: 适用范围描述过于宽泛，导致模型可信度下降。

function: 引入并解释关键数学符号
template: Let ___ denote the set of ___ in the GPU architecture.
when_to_use: 在模型公式推导前，统一定义所有符号。
common_mistakes: 符号定义不清晰或与通用惯例冲突。

function: 解释对复杂系统的简化处理
template: For tractability, the model simplifies the ___ by considering only ___.
when_to_use: 当模型忽略某些复杂因素时，需向读者说明。
common_mistakes: 简化处理未加说明，可能被视为模型缺陷。

function: 概述方法的整体流程
template: The proposed coordination method follows a pipeline: 1) ___, 2) ___, 3) ___.
when_to_use: 在方法章节开头，提供一个宏观的技术路线图。
common_mistakes: 流程描述不清，步骤之间逻辑关系不明。

function: 详细描述算法的各个步骤
template: Step 1: Generate an initial population of ___. Step 2: Evaluate each solution using the ___ function.
when_to_use: 详细阐述自提出算法或优化流程的具体操作。
common_mistakes: 步骤描述不精确，缺乏可复现的细节。

function: 说明算法实现的关键细节
template: The algorithm is implemented on the GPU using the ___, where each thread block handles a subset of ___.
when_to_use: 在方法或实验章节，解释如何将理论方法转化为可执行代码。
common_mistakes: 实现细节过于底层，淹没了算法核心思想。

function: 描述实验所用的数据集或问题实例
template: The experiments are conducted on a benchmark suite consisting of ___ well-known ___ functions.
when_to_use: 在实验设置部分，说明测试数据的来源和特征。
common_mistakes: 数据描述不完整，未说明选择理由或预处理。

function: 定义评估算法性能的指标
template: Algorithm performance is evaluated using two metrics: ___ (average value found) and ___ (best value found).
when_to_use: 在实验设置部分，明确评估标准。
common_mistakes: 指标选择不当，或未说明指标计算方法。

function: 报告具体的数值结果
template: The proposed method achieved a ___ improvement in ___ over the baseline, reducing the average error from X to Y.
when_to_use: 在结果部分，用具体数字展示性能提升。
common_mistakes: 仅报告平均值，未提供方差或统计显著性检验。

function: 用表格形式对比不同方法的结果
template: Table X compares the performance of the proposed algorithm with ___ on the ___.
when_to_use: 当需要比较多个方法在多个问题上的表现时。
common_mistakes: 表格信息过载，重点不突出；或未对最佳结果进行高亮。

function: 解释实验结果背后的内在机制
template: The performance gain can be attributed to the effective ___ of the search process on the ___.
when_to_use: 在讨论部分，不仅描述‘是什么’，更解释‘为什么’。
common_mistakes: 解释停留在表面，未深入算法原理或硬件特性。

function: 分析方法中的权衡关系
template: There exists a trade-off between ___ and ___; increasing the ___ improves exploration but may increase ___.
when_to_use: 讨论设计选择或参数调整带来的利弊。
common_mistakes: 只强调优点，回避或忽视潜在的缺点。

function: 总结论文的主要工作
template: This thesis has addressed the problem of ___ by developing ___ and proposing ___.
when_to_use: 在结论章节开头，简洁回顾全文工作。
common_mistakes: 重复摘要内容，未基于正文结果进行提炼。

function: State the practical motivation for protecting electronics
template: В условиях интенсивного воздействия ___ на электронную аппаратуру задача обеспечения её радиационной стойкости приобретает ___ значение.
when_to_use: Opening section motivating the research problem
common_mistakes: Missing connection to specific application domain

function: Formulate the central research problem
template: Существующие методы защиты электронной аппаратуры от воздействия ___ не позволяют в достаточной мере учитывать ___ при выборе проектного решения.
when_to_use: Defining the gap that motivates the dissertation
common_mistakes: Not linking to prior work limitations

function: Declare the research objective
template: Целью настоящей работы является разработка ___ для анализа и визуального поиска оптимальных конфигураций ___.
when_to_use: Stating the main goal of the dissertation

function: Enumerate research tasks
template: Для достижения поставленной цели необходимо решить следующие задачи: 1) провести ___; 2) разработать ___; 3) реализовать ___; 4) провести ___.
when_to_use: Listing specific research tasks after the objective
common_mistakes: Tasks not logically connected to objective
Too many tasks without clear prioritization

function: Preview main contributions
template: Основными результатами работы являются: модель ___; алгоритм ___; система ___.
when_to_use: Previewing contributions in the introduction
common_mistakes: Listing implementation details instead of conceptual contributions

function: Describe the thesis structure
template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы. В первой главе ___, во второй ___, в третьей ___.
when_to_use: Describing thesis organization

function: Present a classification of protection methods
template: Методы защиты электронной аппаратуры от воздействия ___ можно классифицировать по следующим признакам: ___.
when_to_use: Organizing prior work into a structured taxonomy

function: Compare existing approaches
template: Сравнительный анализ существующих методов ___ показал, что подходы на основе ___ обладают преимуществами в части ___, однако уступают по ___.
when_to_use: Comparing survey entries systematically

function: Identify limitations of prior work
template: Однако существующие подходы имеют ряд ограничений: ___ не позволяет ___, а ___ не учитывает ___.
when_to_use: Justifying the need for the proposed approach

function: Articulate the research gap
template: Таким образом, в литературе отсутствует комплексный подход, объединяющий ___ и ___ для решения задачи ___.
when_to_use: Transitioning from survey to proposed approach
common_mistakes: Gap not clearly connected to limitations
Gap too narrow or too broad

function: Position the proposed work relative to prior art
template: В отличие от существующих решений, предложенный подход основан на ___ и позволяет ___.
when_to_use: Positioning contribution after literature review

function: Justify baseline selection for comparison
template: В качестве базового метода для сравнения выбран ___, поскольку он является ___ и широко применяется в ___.
when_to_use: Selecting comparison baselines in survey or experiments

function: State model assumptions
template: При построении математической модели предполагается, что ___ является ___, а ___ остаётся ___.
when_to_use: Declaring assumptions before presenting a model

function: Introduce notation and symbols
template: Обозначим через ___ количество слоёв экрана, через ___ — толщину i-го слоя, через ___ — плотность материала.
when_to_use: Introducing mathematical notation for the model

function: Define constraints on the model
template: Параметры многослойного экрана удовлетворяют следующим ограничениям: ___ ≤ ___ ≤ ___, причём суммарная толщина ___ не превышает ___.
when_to_use: Defining feasible region for optimization

function: Justify model simplifications
template: Для упрощения расчётов предполагается, что влиянием ___ можно пренебречь, поскольку его вклад составляет не более ___ от ___.
when_to_use: Justifying why certain effects are neglected

function: Specify boundary conditions
template: Граничные условия задачи определяются следующим образом: при ___ значение ___ равно ___.
when_to_use: Setting boundary conditions for a physical or computational model

function: Overview the proposed algorithmic pipeline
template: Общий алгоритм работы системы включает следующие этапы: 1) ___; 2) ___; 3) ___; 4) ___.
when_to_use: Describing the overall workflow of the proposed method

function: Define inputs and outputs of each processing step
template: На входе этапа ___ поступает ___, на выходе формируется ___ в формате ___.
when_to_use: Specifying interface between algorithm stages

function: Describe algorithm steps in detail
template: Алгоритм ___ выполняется следующим образом: для каждого ___ вычисляется ___, затем результат ___.
when_to_use: Detailing algorithmic steps within a stage

function: Explain parameter selection rationale
template: Значение параметра ___ выбрано равным ___ на основании ___ и подтверждено ___.
when_to_use: Justifying parameter choices in the proposed method

function: Analyze computational complexity
template: Вычислительная сложность предложенного алгоритма составляет O(___) по времени и O(___) по памяти, где ___ — ___.
when_to_use: Providing complexity analysis of the algorithm

function: Detail implementation specifics
template: Программная реализация выполнена на языке ___ с использованием биотеки ___. Основные классы системы: ___.
when_to_use: Describing software implementation
common_mistakes: Too much detail on trivial choices

function: Describe experimental data
template: В эксперименте использовались данные, представляющие собой набор из ___ конфигураций многослойных экранов с числом слоёв от ___ до ___.
when_to_use: Describing experimental datasets

function: Design experimental scenarios
template: Для оценки эффективности предложенного метода были сформированы следующие сценарии: сценарий 1 — ___; сценарий 2 — ___; сценарий 3 — ___.
when_to_use: Designing experiments with multiple scenarios

function: Define evaluation metrics
template: Для количественной оценки качества ___ используются следующие метрики: ___, которые позволяют охарактеризовать ___.
when_to_use: Defining metrics for experimental evaluation
common_mistakes: Using metrics that don't align with objectives

function: Ensure experimental reproducibility
template: Для воспроизводимости результатов все эксперименты проводились при фиксированных значениях ___: ___. Исходный код и данные доступны по адресу ___.
when_to_use: Ensuring reproducibility of experiments

function: introduces the relevance of the study
template: Актуальность исследования обусловлена ___ в области криогенного машиностроения.
when_to_use: at the beginning of the introduction to justify the study

function: states the research problem
template: В настоящее время проблема ___ не решена удовлетворительно в контексте эксплуатационных температур.
when_to_use: after motivation to define the specific problem

function: states the research objective
template: Целью данного исследования является разработка методов для ___ криогенных топливных баков.
when_to_use: to clarify the main aim of the thesis
common_mistakes: stating too broad or too narrow

function: outlines the research tasks
template: Для достижения поставленной цели были определены следующие задачи: ___.
when_to_use: immediately after stating the objective
common_mistakes: not linking tasks to the objective

function: defines the object and subject of study
template: Объектом исследования является ___, а предметом — ___ в условиях криогенных температур.
when_to_use: to specify what is being studied

function: highlights key contributions
template: Основные результаты работы заключаются в предложении методов ___ для повышения эффективности испытаний.
when_to_use: to preview the main contributions before details

function: describes the dissertation structure
template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы, где каждая глава посвящена ___.
when_to_use: at the end of the introduction to guide the reader

function: classifies existing methods
template: Методы охлаждения металлических конструкций можно классифицировать на ___ на основе ___ criteria.
when_to_use: in the literature review to organize prior work

function: compares different approaches
template: Сравнительный анализ ___ показал, что ___ подходы имеют преимущества в terms of ___.
when_to_use: to evaluate strengths and weaknesses of methods

function: Provide historical context to motivate the research
template: Historically, in [___], by [___], there were [___] production plants for [___].
when_to_use: In introductions to set the stage for the problem by citing historical data.
common_mistakes: Using overly specific details without generalization

function: State the core problem that motivates the research
template: Starting from [___], [___] began to [___] due to [___].
when_to_use: In introduction to define the research problem based on observed trends.
common_mistakes: Being too vague about the problem
Not linking the problem to the research context

function: Motivate the research by presenting current opportunities
template: Currently, in [___], there are political and economic prerequisites to revive [___] in full.
when_to_use: In introduction to justify the timeliness and relevance of the research.
common_mistakes: Being too optimistic without acknowledging challenges

function: Explain the root cause of the problem
template: The objective reason for this was that [___] failed to [___] [___] ensuring [___].
when_to_use: In introduction or background to delve into causes of observed issues.

function: To present a structured classification or typology of a concept.
template: The applications of ___ can be classified into the following categories: ___
when_to_use: When structuring a review section that organizes different applications or types of a technology.
common_mistakes: Listing items without a clear classifying principle.

function: To compare the advantages or characteristics of two technologies.
template: The advantages of ___ technology over ___ are ___
when_to_use: When introducing a new technology by contrasting it with an established one.
common_mistakes: Failing to specify the criteria for comparison.

function: To state the limitations of existing semiconductor technology.
template: A key limitation of ___ is ___
when_to_use: In the introduction or problem statement to motivate the need for a new approach.
common_mistakes: Being overly general without citing specific constraints.

function: To identify a research gap in the existing manufacturing technology.
template: However, significant problems remain in the ___ technology of ___
when_to_use: To transition from reviewing the state-of-the-art to stating the unresolved problems.
common_mistakes: Stating a gap without linking it to the consequences or motivation.

function: To state the general necessity or potential for a field of study.
template: The necessity and potential of applying ___ are driven by ___
when_to_use: At the very beginning of the introduction to establish broad relevance.
common_mistakes: Using overly technical language before setting the general context.

function: To articulate the core technical challenge addressed.
template: This work addresses the problem of ___ in the technology for ___
when_to_use: To clearly define the scope of the dissertation after introducing the field.
common_mistakes: Defining the problem too broadly, encompassing issues outside the thesis scope.

function: To state the main research objective.
template: The objective of this research is to investigate and develop a technology for ___
when_to_use: To state the primary goal following the problem statement.
common_mistakes: Making the objective too vague or too narrow.

function: To open a main chapter by stating its topic and purpose.
template: Chapter ___. ___
when_to_use: To begin a new major chapter, often a literature review or methodology chapter.
common_mistakes: Only repeating the title without a functional phrase.

function: To list the dimensions or criteria used to evaluate a technology.
template: The key criteria for evaluating ___ include ___
when_to_use: In a review section to structure the analysis of different solutions.
common_mistakes: Choosing criteria that are not relevant to the thesis objectives.

function: State research motivation in engineering/manufacturing context
template: Повышение работоспособности поверхностного слоя является актуальной задачей в области ___
when_to_use: Opening motivation paragraph for surface engineering research
common_mistakes: Too vague without specifying application area

function: Connect research topic to industrial relevance
template: Развитие методов создания упрочненных поверхностных структур повышенной ___ позволяет решить задачу ___
when_to_use: Establishing practical significance of research

function: Formulate the core problem in manufacturing context
template: Существующие методы ___ не обеспечивают требуемого уровня ___ при одновременном ___
when_to_use: Problem statement highlighting limitations of current approaches

function: State the dissertation objective
template: Целью работы является разработка комплекса технологических решений по ___ на основе ___
when_to_use: Formulating the main research objective
common_mistakes: Objective too broad or not measurable

function: List research tasks
template: Для достижения поставленной цели необходимо решить следующие задачи: ___
when_to_use: Enumerating specific research tasks after objective
common_mistakes: Tasks not logically connected to objective

function: Preview main contributions
template: Основными результатами работы являются: разработка ___; обоснование ___; создание ___
when_to_use: Previewing contributions at end of introduction

function: Describe dissertation structure
template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы
when_to_use: Describing thesis organization

function: Classify existing methods in a domain
template: Методы повышения работоспособности поверхностного слоя можно классифицировать по ___: ___
when_to_use: Structuring literature review around classification

function: Compare two approaches
template: В отличие от метода ___, метод ___ позволяет обеспечить ___ при ___

function: Identify limitations of prior work
template: Однако указанные методы обладают рядом ограничений: ___ не обеспечивает ___ при ___

function: Identify research gap
template: В настоящее время недостаточно изучен вопрос ___ при ___

function: Position own work relative to prior art

function: Define axes for evaluating methods

function: Define input and output of a processing step

template: Расчет ___ выполняется в следующей последовательности: определяется ___; рассчитывается ___; вычисляется ___

function: Describe implementation specifics

function: Describe experimental data sources
template: Экспериментальные данные получены на установке ___ при обработке образцов из ___

template: Экспериментальный сценарий включает ___ при условиях ___

template: Качество распознавания оценивается по метрикам: ___, ___

function: Выбор методов для сравнения
template: В качестве методов сравнения выбраны: ___, ___, ___
