function: Introduce the research problem in the context of the field.
template: This work addresses the problem of ___ for spacecraft structures.
slots: computing and optimizing integrated mesh composite
when_to_use: At the beginning of the introduction to state the core problem.
common_mistakes: Not linking to the application domain (spacecraft)

function: State the main objective of the research.
template: The objective of this dissertation is to develop ___ for determining optimal parameters of mesh composite structures.
when_to_use: In the introduction, after stating the problem.
common_mistakes: Using 'to study' which is too vague for a doctoral objective

function: Present a classification of prior work or concepts.
template: The chapter reviews contemporary approaches categorized by ___ in the field of mesh structures for aerospace technology.
when_to_use: At the start of a literature review chapter to organize the discussion.

function: Identify a gap in the existing literature.
template: However, a comprehensive approach that integrates ___ for different types of mesh shells (cylindrical, conical) remains underdeveloped.
slots: stiffness coefficients, stability analysis, and dynamic response
when_to_use: After summarizing prior art to justify the need for your work.
common_mistakes: Claiming no one has ever done anything related

function: State the key modeling assumptions.
template: The discrete-continuum model is based on the assumption that ___ of the mesh structure can be averaged.
when_to_use: When introducing a new theoretical model in the methodology.
common_mistakes: Burying assumptions in footnotes or appendices

function: Introduce specific notation or variables.
template: Let ___ denote the coefficients of stiffness for the grid structure.
when_to_use: When first presenting a key equation or set of parameters.
common_mistakes: Using inconsistent notation throughout the text

function: Provide a high-level overview of the methodological pipeline.
template: The proposed method involves deriving ___, followed by ___, and concluding with ___.
slots: the equations of the applied theory
analytical solutions for stability and dynamics
when_to_use: In the introduction to a methodology chapter to outline the workflow.
common_mistakes: Jumping directly into details without a roadmap

function: Describe a step within a computational or analytical algorithm.
template: The optimization of the structure is performed by varying ___ within specified constraints.
slots: the spiral, ring, and longitudinal rib parameters
when_to_use: When detailing the procedural steps of your method.

function: Describe the source or nature of experimental/case study data.
template: The methods are applied to the design of ___ for the launch vehicle.
when_to_use: When introducing the practical case studies in a chapter.
common_mistakes: Not providing enough context about the application scenario

function: Define a specific load case or scenario for analysis.
template: The stability of the cylindrical shell is investigated under the action of ___.
when_to_use: When specifying the boundary conditions for a particular analysis.
common_mistakes: Assuming the reader knows the standard test cases

function: Report a quantitative result.
template: The calculation yields a critical buckling load of ___ for the given parameters.
when_to_use: To present key findings from your analysis.
common_mistakes: Reporting numbers without specifying units or context

function: Introduce a comparison of different models or results.

when_to_use: To present comparative analysis results.

function: Explain the underlying reason or mechanism for a result.
template: The increase in ___ is attributed to the higher stiffness contributed by the system of ribs.
when_to_use: In the discussion section to interpret why a result occurred.
common_mistakes: Simply restating the result without explanation

function: Discuss the broader applicability of the findings.
template: The presented approach can be generalized to the analysis of ___ structures beyond those considered here.
slots: other types of lattice and grid
when_to_use: To suggest how your work extends to other areas.

function: Summarize the main accomplishments.
template: The dissertation presents the results of ___ for a class of mesh composite structures.
when_to_use: In the concluding chapter to recap the work.
common_mistakes: Introducing new information in the summary

function: Suggest directions for future research.
template: Future work could focus on extending the method to account for ___ under complex loading.
when_to_use: At the end of the conclusion to point forward.
common_mistakes: Suggesting work that is too trivial or unrelated

function: Open a new chapter or major section.
template: This chapter deals with the ___ of mesh cylindrical shells.
when_to_use: To start a new thematic section.

function: Introduce a formal definition.
template: A mesh structure is defined as ___ with a specific geometric pattern.
slots: a thin-walled shell reinforced by a system of ribs
when_to_use: When first defining a key term for the work.
common_mistakes: Using a dictionary definition rather than a technical one

function: Discuss the practical implementation or deployment context.
template: The method is implemented in the design process for the ___ of the launch vehicle.
when_to_use: When connecting theory to real-world application.

function: Comment on the computational or practical complexity of the method.
template: The analytical solutions provided allow for ___ compared to full-scale FEA.
slots: a significant reduction in computational time
when_to_use: To highlight a practical advantage of your method.

function: Establish the broad societal impact and urgency of the research topic.
template: Изучение ___ становится особенно актуальным в условиях ___ и ___.
when_to_use: To connect the research topic to major contemporary crises or global challenges.

function: Introduce a key problem or phenomenon motivating the study.
template: В XXI в. ___ обрело форму, приводящую к ___ и ставящую под угрозу ___.
when_to_use: In the introduction to frame a core problem.
common_mistakes: Listing too many consequences at once.
The threat is not clearly linked to the phenomenon.

function: Clearly state the central contradiction or issue the dissertation addresses.
template: С одной стороны, это устойчивый тип существования общества, но с другой – ___ должен иметь основой ___.
when_to_use: To formulate a core theoretical problem or paradox.
common_mistakes: The two sides are not truly contradictory.

function: State the main goal of the research.
template: В контексте данной диагностики ___ выглядит не просто как ___, а как ___.
when_to_use: To elevate the significance of the research objective beyond mere description.
common_mistakes: The two interpretations are not clearly distinguished in terms of gravity.

function: Connect a historical observation to current research needs.
template: В этом контексте ___ выглядит уже не просто как ___, а как ___.
when_to_use: To reframe a known concept or finding within a new urgent context.
common_mistakes: The transition between interpretations is abrupt.

function: Compare the scope or accessibility of a phenomenon across different historical periods.
template: Если раньше ___ было прерогативой ___ , в ___ оно стало доступным для ___.
when_to_use: To show the democratization or expansion of a social practice.
common_mistakes: Overstating the absence of the practice in earlier times.

function: Point out an unexpected outcome that contradicts a prior theoretical expectation.
template: Это должно было привести к ___, однако подобного не произошло, более того, ___.
when_to_use: To highlight a research puzzle or gap in understanding.
common_mistakes: Not specifying the theoretical basis for the initial expectation.

function: Identify a structural contradiction that defines a research gap.
template: После Второй мировой войны, ___, что привело к ___. Однако ___ стал ___.
when_to_use: To trace the origins of a current problem to a specific historical shift.

function: Reference a classification system used to categorize societal phenomena.
template: В рамках социальной философии зафиксировано в таких теориях, как ___, ___ и ___.
when_to_use: To situate the work within a family of related theoretical concepts.
common_mistakes: The listed theories are not sufficiently distinct or related to the core topic.

function: Formulate a critical question that justifies the study's focus.
template: Почему же изучение ___ особенно актуально?
when_to_use: To directly introduce the central justification for the research.
common_mistakes: Using as a filler without following up with a compelling answer.

function: State a foundational premise about human behavior distinct from other living beings.
template: В отличие от ___, человек ___ не только для удовлетворения ___.
when_to_use: To establish a basic anthropological or philosophical assumption.

function: Define the core social function of an object or practice within the study's framework.
template: В человеческом мире ___ несет ___, является атрибутом ___ и ___.
when_to_use: To outline the theoretical boundaries or key aspects of the central concept.
common_mistakes: Listing attributes that are not clearly distinct.

function: Introduce a temporal marker that specifies the era of a problematic development.
template: В рамках этой атрибутивности в XXI в. ___ обрело ___ форму.
when_to_use: To specify the historical periodization of the phenomenon under study.
common_mistakes: The adjective is not sufficiently precise or analytical.

function: Describe a process that has become a defining characteristic of a societal stage.
template: К ___ г. ___ превратилось в ___, наличие которой диагностировал в работе ___ .
when_to_use: To cite a key diagnostic moment or work for the problem.

function: Outline the structure of a theoretical argument by presenting premises sequentially.
template: Это вызвано несколькими посылами. 1. ___. 2. ___ и ___.
when_to_use: To structure the justification for the study's urgency in the introduction.
common_mistakes: The premises are not logically connected to the central problem.

function: Break down a complex historical-societal process into logical steps.
template: После ___, ___, что привело к ___. Это породило ряд других феноменов, таких как ___.
when_to_use: To analyze the cause-and-effect chain in social history.
common_mistakes: Treating historical development as overly linear.

function: Explain a societal dynamic where increased accessibility does not lead to expected equality.
template: Подобного не произошло, более того, ___.
when_to_use: To highlight a paradox or counterintuitive social outcome.
common_mistakes: Stating the outcome without linking it back to the initial premise.

function: Frame a societal state as a trade-off between stability and long-term viability.
template: С одной стороны, это устойчивый тип существования, но с другой – ___.
when_to_use: To present the core tension or trade-off in a social system.
common_mistakes: The two sides are not of comparable weight or nature.

function: Recast a diagnostic finding as an existential threat, elevating the stakes.
template: Это – диагноз ___ болезни общества, которое может оказаться в ситуации не только ___, но и ___.
when_to_use: In the conclusion to summarize the profound implication of the research.
common_mistakes: Overstating the certainty of the dire outcome.

function: Introduce a temporal or thematic sequence of arguments.
template: После Второй мировой войны... Производственные мощности также породили... Почему же изучение... особенно актуально?
when_to_use: To illustrate how a sequence of points can be linked to build an argument. This is a UTIL example.
common_mistakes: This template is too long and specific to be a general TEMPLATE; it is better suited as a CONNECTIVE UTIL example.

function: States the broad industrial or technological context justifying the research.
template: In the current context of [INDUSTRY/TECHNOLOGY TRENDS], [GENERAL GOAL/CHALLENGE] is a key issue addressed during [DESIGN/DEVELOPMENT STAGE].
when_to_use: To open an introduction by establishing the practical importance of the research field.
common_mistakes: Making the connection to the specific research problem too indirect.

function: Defines the specific, challenging problem that the thesis addresses.
template: A particularly complex type of [BROAD LOAD/PHENOMENON], such as [SPECIFIC INSTANCE], occurring during [OPERATIONAL PHASE], can trigger dangerous [DYNAMIC PHENOMENA] (e.g., [PHENOMENON_1], [PHENOMENON_2]).
when_to_use: To precisely articulate the core technical challenge after the broad relevance is established.
common_mistakes: Listing phenomena without explaining why they are dangerous.
Failing to connect the instance to the specific operational context.

function: Declares the main goal of the thesis.
template: This work is dedicated to the development of a [METHODOLOGY/MODEL] for simulating [COMPLEX LOAD/PHENOMENON] arising during [SPECIFIC STAGE].
when_to_use: To provide a clear, high-level statement of the thesis's primary aim.
common_mistakes: Not specifying the 'development' aspect of the contribution.

function: Highlights the novelty and justification of the developed methodology.
template: The development of a high-performance methodology for calculating [UNSTEADY LOADS] is relevant not only for [APPLICATION_1] but also for [APPLICATION_2].
when_to_use: To justify the need for the new methodology by emphasizing its dual utility.
common_mistakes: Listing applications that are too similar.
Failing to use hedging words like 'is relevant'.

function: Identifies shortcomings in existing review or methods.
template: Prior reviews have primarily focused on [SPECIFIC ASPECT_1] and [ASPECT_2], while less attention has been given to [NEGLECTED ASPECT].
when_to_use: In a literature review to create a gap for the current research.
common_mistakes: Being overly critical of previous work.
The identified gap must genuinely connect to the thesis's contribution.

function: Compares different methodological approaches from the literature.
template: Existing computational methods for [PROBLEM TYPE] include [METHOD_A] and [METHOD_B], which differ in their [CRITERION_1] and [CRITERION_2].
when_to_use: To structure a comparative analysis of prior methods in a literature survey.
common_mistakes: Not providing a balanced comparison of pros and cons.

function: Specifies the idealized conditions or constraints of the mathematical model.
template: The mathematical formulation of the [PHYSICAL PROBLEM] assumes [ASSUMPTION_1] and [ASSUMPTION_2], simplifying the [COMPLEXITY] to focus on [KEY EFFECT].
when_to_use: When presenting the assumptions behind a theoretical or computational model.
common_mistakes: Not justifying why the assumptions are reasonable.
Using assumptions that invalidate the core problem being studied.

function: Acknowledges sources of error or imprecision in the model description.
template: The description of the [AERODYNAMIC] subsystem involves [SOURCES OF UNCERTAINTY] related to [PARAMETER] estimation and [PHENOMENON] modeling.
when_to_use: In the model description chapter to transparently discuss model limitations.
common_mistakes: Being vague about the nature of the uncertainties.
Failing to mention how they are later addressed or their impact assessed.

function: Outlines the sequential steps of the solution algorithm.
template: The solution algorithm for the [SPECIFIC PROBLEM] consists of the following key steps: [STEP_1], [STEP_2], and iterative [STEP_3] until convergence.
when_to_use: To present a clear, structured overview of a proposed computational method.
common_mistakes: Overloading with implementation details too early.
Using non-standard terminology for the steps.

function: Provides a conservative claim about computational or practical demands.
template: The proposed approach, while comprehensive, demands significant [RESOURCE] for [APPLICATION_CONTEXT] due to its [CHARACTERISTIC].
when_to_use: To set realistic expectations about the methodology's applicability.
common_mistakes: Either overselling or underselling the complexity.
Not linking the characteristic (e.g., high fidelity) to the resource cost.

function: Describes the setup of a test case or validation scenario.
template: To validate the [COMPONENT] model, a [DIMENSION]D test problem of [PHYSICAL SCENARIO] (e.g., [SPECIFIC EXAMPLE]) was formulated.
when_to_use: When introducing benchmark or methodological test cases in an experiments chapter.
common_mistakes: Choosing a test case that is too trivial or too complex.
Not explaining why the chosen scenario is appropriate for validation.

function: Reports quantitative results in a standard format.
template: The simulation yielded [PHYSICAL QUANTITY] values of [NUMERIC RANGE] under [TEST CONDITION].
when_to_use: To present key numerical findings from experiments or simulations.
common_mistakes: Reporting only single values without context of range or variation.
Failing to specify the exact condition under which the result holds.

function: Presents detailed analysis of a specific, illustrative example from the results.
template: A detailed analysis of [SPECIFIC CASE] revealed [KEY INSIGHT_1] and [INSIGHT_2] regarding the [MECHANISM].
when_to_use: To delve deeper into an interesting or complex example from the broader result set.
common_mistakes: Choosing an outlier case without justification.
Presenting insights without linking them back to the broader research questions.

function: Explains the physical or computational reason behind an observed result.
template: The observed [PHENOMENON] in the results can be attributed to the [PHYSICAL MECHANISM], which is particularly pronounced under [CONDITION].
when_to_use: To interpret results by connecting them to underlying principles, not just describing them.
common_mistakes: Stating a correlation as a definitive causal mechanism.
Invoking overly complex mechanisms when a simpler explanation suffices.

function: Concisely restates the main focus and outcome of the work.
template: This dissertation presented the development and application of a [METHODOLOGY] for determining [KEY RESULT] under [SPECIFIC CONDITIONS].
when_to_use: To begin the conclusion chapter with a high-level recap of the entire thesis.
common_mistakes: Introducing new information or arguments not presented in the body.

function: Summarizes the main scientific or practical contributions claimed in the thesis.
template: The primary contributions of this work include the [CONTRIBUTION_1] and the [CONTRIBUTION_2] validated through [METHOD].
when_to_use: To explicitly list and reinforce the novel aspects of the research in the conclusion.
common_mistakes: Failing to differentiate contributions from mere outcomes.

function: Introduces the purpose or content of the next major section or chapter.
template: Chapter [N] is dedicated to [CHAPTER TOPIC], with the primary goal of [CHAPTER GOAL].
when_to_use: At the very beginning of a new chapter or major section to orient the reader.
common_mistakes: Being too cryptic or using a sub-heading as an opener.
Stating the obvious (e.g., 'This chapter contains results').

function: Formally introduces a key term or symbol used in the thesis.
template: The [PARAMETER/TERM] is defined as the [MATHEMATICAL/PHYSICAL DESCRIPTION], representing [PHYSICAL MEANING].
when_to_use: When first introducing a critical technical term or variable in the methodology.
common_mistakes: Using inconsistent symbols or terms after definition.
Providing a definition that is too vague or too narrow.

function: Conservatively discusses real-world implementation challenges.
template: Deploying this methodology in a [REAL-WORLD CONTEXT] would require addressing [PRACTICAL CHALLENGE_1] and [CHALLENGE_2], such as [SPECIFIC EXAMPLE].
when_to_use: In the discussion or conclusion to acknowledge the gap between academic research and practical application.
common_mistakes: Listing challenges that are obvious or trivial.
Not providing concrete examples of the challenges.

function: 陈述研究主题的重要性及其工程背景。
template: The development and quality assurance of ___ (e.g., internal cycloidal screw surfaces) are critical for the performance of ___ (e.g., single-screw volumetric machines).
when_to_use: 用于论文引言或背景介绍部分，开篇点明研究对象的价值。
common_mistakes: 过于宽泛，未结合具体研究对象

function: 明确陈述当前存在的具体技术问题或挑战。
template: Existing methods for forming ___ (e.g., internal cycloidal surfaces) face challenges in achieving ___ (e.g., required precision, surface quality).
when_to_use: 用于引言或第一章分析结尾，引出研究必要性。
common_mistakes: 问题描述模糊，未与现有方法建立联系

function: 清晰陈述论文的核心研究目标。
template: The objective of this work is to develop ___ (e.g., a methodology for) ___ (e.g., the cutting processing) of ___ (e.g., internal cycloidal screw surfaces) to ensure ___ (e.g., its quality).
slots: type of deliverable (e.g., method, model, approach)
when_to_use: 在引言末尾或专门陈述目标的段落使用。
common_mistakes: 目标过于宏大或不具体

function: 概述论文后续章节的组织结构。
template: The thesis is structured as follows: Chapter 1 reviews ___; Chapter 2 presents ___; Chapter 3 describes ___; Chapter 4 discusses ___.
when_to_use: 通常位于引言末尾，为读者提供阅读路线图。
common_mistakes: 描述与实际章节内容不符

function: 分析现有方法或技术的潜力与不足。
template: An analysis of the technological capabilities of modern methods for forming ___ reveals that ___ (e.g., method A) provides ___ while limited in ___.
when_to_use: 用于文献综述章节，系统评述相关工作。
common_mistakes: 只有罗列，没有分析性评述

function: 明确指出现有技术或方法的具体局限性。
template: Prior work on ___ (e.g., machining of complex surfaces) is often limited by ___ (e.g., the geometric capabilities of tools or low productivity).
when_to_use: 在分析章节中，用于论证研究缺口。
common_mistakes: 笼统批评，未指出具体技术瓶颈

function: 基于文献分析，指明研究缺口。
template: Therefore, a gap exists in the development of ___ (e.g., comprehensive methodologies) for ___ (e.g., the blade processing of internal cycloidal surfaces) considering ___ (e.g., both geometric accuracy and surface quality).
when_to_use: 在第一章分析末尾，自然过渡到研究目标。
common_mistakes: 提出的缺口与前面的分析脱节

function: 陈述建立数学模型时所做的基本假设。
template: The mathematical model of the kinematics of the proposed method assumes ___ (e.g., rigid body tool motion) and ___ (e.g., ideal cutting conditions).
when_to_use: 在理论建模章节的起始部分。
common_mistakes: 隐含假设未说明，或假设不合理

function: 引入或定义关键的符号表示。
template: Let ___ denote ___ (e.g., the axial feed rate), and ___ represent ___ (e.g., the tool geometry parameter).
when_to_use: 在推导公式或建立模型之前。

function: 讨论模型参数的确定方法与依据。
template: The model parameters, such as ___ and ___, are identified based on ___ (e.g., the physical constraints of the machining process) and ___ (e.g., preliminary experimental data).
when_to_use: 在模型建立后，解释参数来源的段落。

function: 概括提出的技术方法或流程的主要步骤。
template: The proposed methodology for ___ (e.g., tool design) involves a pipeline comprising ___ (e.g., kinematic modeling), ___ (e.g., geometric analysis), and ___ (e.g., cutting mode calculation).
when_to_use: 在方法章节的引言或概述部分。
common_mistakes: 步骤描述过于简略，缺乏逻辑关联

function: 明确定义算法或方法的输入与输出。
template: Given the input parameters ___ (e.g., the required surface profile and material), the method outputs ___ (e.g., the optimal tool geometry and cutting modes).
when_to_use: 在描述一个具体算法或设计方法时。

function: 说明如何设定或选择关键参数。
template: The cutting parameters, such as ___ (e.g., feed rate) and ___ (e.g., depth of cut), are selected according to ___ (e.g., the developed mathematical models and recommendations).
when_to_use: 在实验设计或工艺参数设定部分。

function: 描述实验场景或试验计划的制定。
template: The experimental campaign was designed to investigate the effect of ___ (e.g., axial feed) on ___ (e.g., surface roughness and profile error).
when_to_use: 在实验章节的开始部分。

function: 列出用于评估实验结果的关键指标。
template: The key performance metrics for evaluation are ___ (e.g., surface roughness Ra) and ___ (e.g., the deviation from the prescribed cross-sectional profile).
when_to_use: 在实验方法或评估标准部分。
common_mistakes: 指标选择不当，无法反映研究目标

function: 说明确保实验可重复性的措施。
template: To ensure reproducibility, the experiments were conducted under ___ (e.g., controlled workshop conditions) with ___ (e.g., specified tool and workpiece materials), and the measurement protocol ___ (e.g., is detailed in Section X).
when_to_use: 在实验设置或方法论描述部分。
common_mistakes: 描述笼统，缺乏具体细节

function: 客观报告具体的实验测量数值。
template: The measured surface roughness ___ (e.g., Ra) ranged from ___ to ___ (e.g., 1.2 μm to 3.5 μm), while the profile error was observed to be ___ (e.g., ±0.05 mm).
when_to_use: 在实验结果部分，首次呈现数据时。
common_mistakes: 只有图表，缺乏文字描述关键数据点

function: 报告所提方法带来的改进或优化效果。
template: Compared to the baseline ___ (e.g., conventional method), the proposed approach achieved a ___ (e.g., 30%) improvement in ___ (e.g., machining accuracy) and a ___ (e.g., 25%) reduction in ___ (e.g., surface roughness).
when_to_use: 在结果讨论部分，进行对比分析时。
common_mistakes: 改进数据缺乏对照基准

function: 描述数据的分布情况或趋势。
template: The experimental data indicates a ___ (e.g., clear decreasing) trend in ___ (e.g., surface roughness) as ___ (e.g., feed rate) increases up to ___ (e.g., a certain value).
when_to_use: 在分析数据规律时使用。
common_mistakes: 趋势描述与图表数据不符

function: 对观察到的实验现象或结果进行机理性解释。
template: The observed improvement in ___ (e.g., profile accuracy) can be attributed to ___ (e.g., the optimized kinematic relationship between tool and workpiece) established by the proposed method.
when_to_use: 在讨论章节，解释实验结果的原因。
common_mistakes: 解释停留在表面，未触及物理或技术原理

function: Формулировка проблемы исследования
template: Проблема контроля ___ заключается в необходимости ___ при условии ___
when_to_use: Вводная часть при постановке проблемы
common_mistakes: Слишком общее описание без привязки к предмету

function: Обоснование актуальности исследования
template: Актуальность работы обусловлена необходимостью повышения ___ в условиях ___
when_to_use: Во введении для обоснования актуальности

function: Постановка цели диссертации
template: Целью работы является разработка метода/системы ___ для обеспечения ___
when_to_use: Во введении при формулировке цели

function: Перечисление задач исследования
template: Для достижения поставленной цели необходимо решить следующие задачи: ___
when_to_use: После формулировки цели

function: Определение объекта и предмета исследования
template: Объектом исследования является ___, а предметом — ___
when_to_use: Во введении для определения границ исследования

function: Краткий перечень основных результатов
template: Основные научные результаты, выносимые на защиту: ___
when_to_use: В конце введения

function: Описание структуры диссертации
template: Диссертация состоит из ___, включающей ___ глав, ___ и списка литературы
when_to_use: В конце введения
common_mistakes: Не указано количество страниц или ссылок

function: Классификация методов или аппаратуры
template: Классификация ___ проводится по признаку ___ и включает следующие группы: ___
when_to_use: В обзоре литературы при систематизации подходов

function: Сравнение существующих методов
template: Сравнительный анализ ___ показал, что метод ___ обеспечивает ___ по сравнению с ___
when_to_use: При сравнении альтернативных подходов

function: Ограничения существующих подходов
template: Основным недостатком ___ является ограниченная ___ при ___
when_to_use: При обосновании необходимости нового подхода

function: Выявление пробела в знаниях
template: В существующих работах недостаточно исследован вопрос ___ при ___
when_to_use: Для обоснования новизны исследования

function: Позиционирование предлагаемого подхода
template: В отличие от существующих методов, предлагаемый подход основан на ___
when_to_use: При обосновании новизны в обзоре

function: Обоснование выбора базового метода для сравнения
template: В качестве базового метода для сравнения выбран ___, поскольку ___
when_to_use: При обосновании экспериментального плана

function: Описание допущений модели
template: При построении модели предполагается, что ___ является ___ при условии ___
when_to_use: При описании математической модели

function: Введение обозначений
template: Обозначим через ___ величину, характеризующую ___, а через ___ — ___
when_to_use: При введении математического аппарата
common_mistakes: Обозначения не совпадают в разных частях

function: Ограничения области применимости модели
template: Модель применима в диапазоне ___ при условии соблюдения ___
when_to_use: При описании границ применимости

function: Упрощения при моделировании
template: Для упрощения расчётов предполагается, что вкладом ___ можно пренебречь по сравнению с ___
when_to_use: При обосновании упрощений модели

function: Учёт неопределённостей в модели
template: Неопределённость в определении ___ обусловлена влиянием ___ и оценивается как ___
when_to_use: При анализе погрешностей модели

function: Общее описание алгоритмической цепочки
template: Алгоритм обработки данных включает следующие этапы: ___, ___, ___
when_to_use: При описании общей методики

function: Описание входных и выходных данных метода
template: На вход алгоритма поступает ___, на выходе формируется ___
when_to_use: При описании интерфейса метода

function: Пошаговое описание алгоритма
template: Шаг 1: ___. Шаг 2: ___. Шаг 3: ___ в результате чего ___
when_to_use: Для детального описания алгоритма

function: Обоснование выбора параметров метода
template: Значение параметра ___ выбрано равным ___ на основании ___
when_to_use: При обосновании настроек алгоритма

function: Оценка вычислительной сложности
template: Вычислительная сложность предложенного алгоритма составляет O(___) по ___
when_to_use: При анализе эффективности алгоритма

function: Детали реализации метода
template: Реализация ___ выполнена на базе ___ с использованием ___
when_to_use: При описании практической реализации

function: План аблационного эксперимента
template: Для оценки вклада ___ проводится эксперимент с исключением ___ из состава ___
when_to_use: При планировании экспериментов

function: Описание экспериментальных данных
template: Экспериментальные данные получены на объектах ___ в количестве ___ при условиях ___
when_to_use: При описании экспериментальной базы

function: Описание сценария эксперимента
template: Эксперимент проводился в условиях ___ при ___ с целью оценки ___
when_to_use: При описании плана эксперимента

function: Введение метрик оценки
template: Для количественной оценки ___ используется метрика ___, определяемая как ___
when_to_use: При обосновании критериев оценки

function: Описание базовых методов для сравнения
template: В качестве эталона для сравнения используется метод/система ___, обеспечивающий ___
when_to_use: При описании экспериментального сравнения

function: Обеспечение воспроизводимости эксперимента
template: Для обеспечения воспроизводимости результатов ___ фиксировались на уровне ___
when_to_use: При описании протокола эксперимента

function: Отчётность статистических результатов
template: Среднее значение ___ составило ___ при стандартном отклонении ___ (n=___)
when_to_use: При представлении статистических данных

function: State topicality of the research area
template: Актуальность темы обусловлена необходимостью ___ в условиях ___
when_to_use: Opening of introduction to justify research importance
common_mistakes: Too vague without specifying concrete conditions

function: Motivate the problem from practical need
template: Управление современными летательными аппаратами осуществляется с использованием ___
when_to_use: Motivation paragraph linking practice to research gap

function: Formal problem statement
template: В настоящей работе решается задача ___ для системы с ___
when_to_use: End of introduction stating the core problem

function: State the main research objective
template: Целью работы является разработка ___ для обеспечения ___
when_to_use: Explicit objective declaration

function: Enumerate research tasks
template: Для достижения поставленной цели необходимо решить следующие задачи: ___
when_to_use: Task enumeration following objective
common_mistakes: Tasks not decomposing the objective logically

function: Preview main contributions
template: Основными результатами работы являются: ___
when_to_use: Summary of contributions in introduction

function: Describe thesis structure
template: Работа состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы
when_to_use: Structural overview at end of introduction

function: Classify existing approaches
template: Существующие методы управления можно классифицировать по следующим признакам: ___
when_to_use: Literature review taxonomy paragraph

function: Compare methods across axes
template: В таблице ___ представлено сравнение методов по критериям ___
when_to_use: Comparison table introduction in survey

function: Identify limitations of prior work
template: Основными ограничениями рассмотренных подходов являются: ___
when_to_use: Transition from survey to gap identification

function: Identify research gap
template: В литературе недостаточно исследован вопрос ___ для случая ___
when_to_use: Gap statement bridging survey and proposed work

function: Position proposed work relative to prior art
template: Предлагаемый подход отличается от ___ тем, что ___
when_to_use: Positioning the contribution against existing work

function: Justify baseline selection
template: В качестве базового метода для сравнения выбран ___ ввиду ___
when_to_use: Selecting baselines for experimental comparison

function: State modeling assumptions
template: Принимаются следующие допущения: ___
when_to_use: Model formulation section

function: Define boundary conditions
template: Граничные условия задачи имеют вид: ___
when_to_use: Problem formulation with boundary constraints

function: Introduce notation
template: Обозначим через ___ величину, характеризующую ___
when_to_use: First appearance of a key variable

function: Define coordinate frames
template: Введём систему координат, связанную с ___
when_to_use: Kinematic or dynamic model formulation

function: State model simplifications
template: Для упрощения модели пренебрегаем влиянием ___
when_to_use: Justifying reduced-order or simplified models

function: Introduce system constraints
template: Ограничения на управляемые переменные имеют вид: ___
when_to_use: Defining actuator or state limits
common_mistakes: Constraints too restrictive for practical use

function: Overview of proposed algorithm pipeline
template: Предлагаемый алгоритм включает следующие этапы: ___
when_to_use: Method overview before detailed description

function: Define algorithm inputs and outputs
template: На вход алгоритма поступает ___; на выходе формируется ___
when_to_use: Interface specification of control algorithm

function: Describe algorithm step
template: На шаге ___ выполняется вычисление ___ на основе ___
when_to_use: Detailed algorithm description

function: Describe parameter selection rationale
template: Параметр ___ выбирается исходя из условия ___
when_to_use: Tuning or design parameter justification

function: Analyze computational complexity
template: Вычислительная сложность алгоритма составляет O(___ )
when_to_use: Performance characterization of algorithm

function: Make conservative stability claim
template: При выполнении условия ___ система сохраняет устойчивость в смысле ___
when_to_use: Stability analysis of proposed controller

function: Provide implementation details
template: Реализация алгоритма выполнена на базе ___ с шагом дискретизации ___
when_to_use: Practical implementation section

function: Describe ablation study plan
template: Для оценки вклада ___ проводится эксперимент с отключением ___
when_to_use: Ablation or component contribution study

function: Describe experimental data
template: Экспериментальные данные получены при моделировании ___ с параметрами ___
when_to_use: Experimental setup description

function: Design experimental scenarios
template: Рассматриваются следующие сценарии: ___
when_to_use: Experimental design section

function: Define evaluation metrics
template: Качество управления оценивается по следующим показателям: ___
when_to_use: Metrics definition before presenting results

function: Specify baseline methods for comparison
template: Для сравнения используются следующие методы: ___
when_to_use: Baseline specification in experiments

function: Report hyperparameter settings
template: Гиперпараметры алгоритма приняты равными: ___
when_to_use: Reproducibility section of experiments

function: Ensure reproducibility
template: Все эксперименты воспроизводимы при фиксации начальных условий ___ и зерна генератора ___
when_to_use: Reproducibility statement

function: Report numeric results
template: Максимальное значение ___ составило ___ при ___
when_to_use: Reporting key experimental numbers

function: Report improvement over baseline
template: Предлагаемый алгоритм обеспечивает улучшение ___ на ___ по сравнению с ___
when_to_use: Comparative improvement statement

function: Report distribution of results
template: Значения ___ распределены в диапазоне от ___ до ___
when_to_use: Reporting result variability

function: Present specific case study
template: На рисунке ___ представлены результаты для случая ___
when_to_use: Introducing a figure or detailed case

function: Discuss failure or degradation cases
template: При значении ___ наблюдается деградация показателя ___ до значения ___
when_to_use: Discussing limitations observed in experiments

function: Introduce comparison results table
template: В таблице ___ приведено сравнение результатов по показателю ___
when_to_use: Introducing a comparison table

function: Explain underlying mechanism
template: Улучшение характеристик объясняется тем, что ___ обеспечивает ___
when_to_use: Mechanistic discussion of why results occur

function: Introduce the research motivation
template: The development of auxiliary circulation pumps is driven by the challenge of ___.
when_to_use: When stating the problem context in the introduction
common_mistakes: Being too vague about the challenge
Not linking to practical medical needs

function: Highlight the relevance of the research
template: Addressing heart failure requires innovations in ___.
when_to_use: When explaining the significance of the work

function: Classify existing approaches
template: Existing pump designs can be categorized into ___ based on ___.
when_to_use: When reviewing literature and organizing prior work

function: Discuss limitations of prior studies
template: Previous models often neglect the effect of ___.
when_to_use: When identifying gaps in existing research

function: Identify research gaps
template: There is a lack of methods for assessing ___.
when_to_use: When motivating the need for new approaches

function: State model assumptions
template: The model assumes that the rotor behaves as a ___.
when_to_use: When setting up the mathematical framework

function: To state the motivation for the research
template: This work is motivated by the need to ___ in the field of ___.
when_to_use: In the introduction to explain why the research is important

function: To define the problem addressed
template: The problem of ___ is critical for ___ due to ___.
when_to_use: To clearly state what the thesis aims to solve

function: To state the main objective
template: The primary objective of this study is to ___ by ___.
when_to_use: To summarize the goal in the introduction

function: To list specific tasks
template: To achieve this, the following tasks are undertaken: ___.
when_to_use: After stating the objective to break it down

function: To preview main contributions
template: Key contributions include ___ and ___.
when_to_use: To highlight novelty at the end of introduction

function: To outline the thesis structure
template: This thesis is organized as follows: Chapter 1 ___, Chapter 2 ___.
when_to_use: At the end of introduction to guide the reader

function: To classify prior work
template: Previous studies can be classified into ___ based on ___.
when_to_use: In literature review to organize sources

function: To compare methods or results
template: Compared to prior work on ___, our approach ___.
when_to_use: To position the work relative to others

function: Обоснование актуальности темы диссертации
template: В данной работе исследуются и разрабатываются ___ для ___
when_to_use: Во введении при обосновании выбора темы
common_mistakes: Слишком абстрактная формулировка без указания предметной области

function: Актуальность работы
template: Актуальность настоящей работы обусловлена ___ и необходимостью ___
when_to_use: В начале введения для мотивации

function: Формулировка проблемы
template: Одной из ключевых проблем в области ___ является ___
when_to_use: При формулировке научной проблемы
common_mistakes: Проблема не вытекает из обзора литературы

function: Цель работы
template: Целью настоящей диссертационной работы является ___
when_to_use: Во введении для обозначения цели
common_mistakes: Цель слишком широка или дублирует тему

function: Постановка задач
template: Для достижения поставленной цели необходимо решить следующие задачи: ___
when_to_use: После формулировки цели во введении

function: Предварительное описание вклада
template: Основными результатами работы являются ___
when_to_use: В конце введения для резюме

function: Описание структуры диссертации
template: Диссертация состоит из ___ глав, ___ приложений и списка литературы из ___ источников
when_to_use: В конце введения

function: Мотивация через потребность
template: Потребность в ___ обусловлена возрастающими требованиями к ___
when_to_use: При обосновании практической значимости

function: Актуальность через развитие области
template: Активное развитие ___ предъявляет повышенные требования к ___
when_to_use: Для обоснования актуальности работы

function: Цель с указанием объекта
template: Целью работы является исследование и разработка ___ с обеспечением ___
when_to_use: Для формулировки цели диссертации

function: 明确陈述论文的核心研究目标。
template: Целью данной работы является ___ .
when_to_use: 引言结尾或第一章开头，明确提出本论文要解决的核心问题。
common_mistakes: 未与后续任务明确区分

function: 概述论文各章节的主要内容和组织结构。
template: Работа состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы.
when_to_use: 引言末尾，为读者提供阅读路线图。
common_mistakes: 描述过于笼统，未体现逻辑递进

function: 指出已有研究或方法存在的具体不足或局限性。
template: Однако существующие методы ___ характеризуются ___ .
when_to_use: 在文献综述中，用于批判性地分析现有工作，为研究gap做铺垫。
common_mistakes: 批评过于笼统，缺乏具体依据
未能与后续提出的方法形成对比

function: 介绍用于评估不同方法或模型的标准体系。
template: Для оценки ___ предложена система критериев, включающая ___ .
when_to_use: 在文献综述或方法论章节，建立评估框架。
common_mistakes: 标准之间相互重叠或不完整

function: 对现有方法进行分类和归纳。
template: Существующие методы ___ могут быть классифицированы по ___ на ___ .
when_to_use: 综述章节，系统梳理研究领域。
common_mistakes: 分类标准不清晰或不一致
类别未能穷尽或存在重叠

function: 声明模型所基于的假设前提。
template: Модель предполагает, что ___ .
when_to_use: 在模型或理论框架章节的开头，明确其适用范围。
common_mistakes: 假设过于严格，脱离实际
遗漏关键假设，导致模型误用

function: 引入或解释论文中使用的关键数学符号或术语。
template: Обозначим через ___ ___ .
when_to_use: 在首次引入关键符号或术语时。
common_mistakes: 未解释符号与物理量的对应关系

function: 概述所提出方法的总体流程或步骤。
template: На основе предложенных моделей разработан алгоритм, включающий следующие этапы: ___ .
when_to_use: 方法章节开头，提供宏观视图。
common_mistakes: 流程描述过于笼统，失去指导意义

function: 详细描述算法或方法的具体计算步骤。
template: Алгоритм предполагает выполнение следующих шагов: 1) ___; 2) ___; ...
when_to_use: 方法论的核心部分，详细阐述如何实现。
common_mistakes: 步骤描述不清晰，难以复现
遗漏关键计算细节或条件

function: 讨论算法的计算复杂度。
template: Вычислительная сложность предложенного алгоритма составляет ___ .
when_to_use: 在算法描述后，分析其效率。
common_mistakes: 未说明在何种输入规模下适用

function: 描述实验所使用的数据来源、规模和特性。
template: В экспериментах использовались данные, характеризующиеся ___ .
when_to_use: 实验章节，交代实验条件。
common_mistakes: 数据描述不清，影响实验可复现性
未说明数据预处理方法

function: 说明实验中用作对比的基准方法或模型。
template: В качестве базовых методов для сравнения были выбраны ___ .
when_to_use: 实验设置部分，明确比较对象。
common_mistakes: 选择的基准方法过时或不具代表性
未说明为何选择这些基准

function: 报告关键的数值实验结果。
template: Проведенные эксперименты показали, что ___ составляет ___ .
when_to_use: 结果与讨论章节，呈现核心发现。
common_mistakes: 未说明数值的统计意义或置信区间

function: 以表格形式呈现不同方法的性能对比。
template: В таблице ___ представлены результаты сравнения ___ по показателю ___ .
when_to_use: 结果部分，用于清晰、系统地展示对比数据。
common_mistakes: 表格设计混乱，重点不突出
未对表格中的关键差异进行解释

function: 解释实验结果背后的原因或机制。
template: Улучшение достигнуто благодаря ___ .
when_to_use: 讨论章节，深入分析结果成因。
common_mistakes: 解释过于推测性，缺乏证据支持
未能联系到模型或算法的具体设计

function: 讨论研究结果的普适性或推广价值。
template: Предложенный подход может быть распространен на ___ .
when_to_use: 讨论章节，阐述工作的意义。
common_mistakes: 推广范围过于随意，缺乏依据
未讨论推广的潜在限制

function: 概括论文的主要研究内容和结论。
template: В работе ___ разработаны и исследованы ___ .
when_to_use: 结论章节开头，总结全文。
common_mistakes: 简单重复引言，未体现增量贡献

function: 提出未来可能的研究方向或改进计划。
template: Дальнейшие исследования могут быть направлены на ___ .
when_to_use: 结论章节末尾，展望未来。
common_mistakes: 方向过于宽泛，与当前工作脱节
未能基于当前研究的局限性提出

function: 开启新的章节或主要部分。
template: В ___ главе ___ .
when_to_use: 每一章的开头。
common_mistakes: 与上一章结尾缺乏逻辑衔接

function: 讨论算法在实际应用中的资源消耗。
template: Реализация алгоритма требует ___ ресурсов (память, время).
when_to_use: 方法或实验部分，评估实用性。
common_mistakes: 资源消耗估计不切实际
未说明测试平台和条件

function: 强调研究主题的广泛重要性或社会价值
template: Изучение ___ способно существенно обогатить ___ знание, а также способствовать совершенствованию ___.
slots: его сущности, форм и способов функционирования
when_to_use: 用于引言中论证研究主题的理论和社会意义时。
common_mistakes: 将研究意义表述得过于狭窄或技术化。
未将意义与具体的学科或实践领域联系起来。

function: 从具体现象出发，引出研究的现实需求
template: Внимания заслуживают не только ___ проявлений ___ в ___, но и прагматическая значимость явления.
when_to_use: 用于引言开篇，通过描述研究对象的复杂性和重要性来吸引读者注意。
common_mistakes: 描述的现象过于抽象，缺乏具体性。
仅罗列特征而未指出其重要性。

function: 指出现状变化，引出研究的新颖性和紧迫性
template: На протяжении веков ___ ассоциировались с ___. Тем не менее, начиная примерно с ___, происходит постепенная реабилитация данных явлений.
slots: смех и явления с ним связанные
when_to_use: 用于引言中，通过对比历史观念与当前趋势来突出研究动机。
common_mistakes: 对历史背景的描述过于冗长或偏离主题。
未清晰指出这种变化如何催生了研究问题。

function: 概述研究对象的最新发展态势
template: Сегодня человечество продвинулось еще дальше — от осознания ___ оно перешло к осознанию возможностей ___.
when_to_use: 用于引言中，展示研究对象已从理论认识发展到实际应用阶段。
common_mistakes: 对“应用”的描述过于笼统。

function: 基于权威学者观点，提出当前社会文化背景下的核心特征
template: Характерной чертой современности является также ___ с ___. ___ пишет: «___».
slots: смешение видов деятельности, традиционно считавшихся «серьезными», с элементами «несерьезных»
В постмодернистском обществе было покончено с противопоставлением серьезного и несерьезного
when_to_use: 用于引言中，引用学者论断来界定问题的当代背景。
common_mistakes: 引用过时或不相关的文献。
未将引述与自己的研究主题建立明确联系。

function: 指出研究在特定应用领域的潜在价值
template: Большие перспективы сулит нам умелое использование ___ в сферах ___.
when_to_use: 用于引言中，强调研究可能对实践领域带来的积极影响。
common_mistakes: 提出的“前景”过于空泛，缺乏具体支撑。

function: 论证某一领域研究的理论与实践双重必要性
template: Дальнейшие исследования в области ___ становятся особенно актуальными в свете ___.
slots: нестандартных педагогических техник, включающих помимо юмора также явление игры
преобладания кризисных явлений в мировой системе образования
when_to_use: 用于引言中，具体化一个研究子方向及其紧迫背景。
common_mistakes: 选择的研究方向过于狭窄。
论证“迫切性”的背景不够有力。

function: 将对象研究与宏观社会进程（如全球化）相联系
template: Процессы глобализации выявляют значимость ___ в ___.
when_to_use: 用于引言中，将微观研究对象置于宏观社会背景下审视其重要性。
common_mistakes: 强行联系宏大的社会进程。

function: 概括某一历史时期内对研究主题的代表性观点
template: В ___ периоде доминировали представления о ___.
when_to_use: 用于文献综述章节，总结特定历史阶段的主导理论。
common_mistakes: 将不同时期的观念混淆。

function: 对比不同理论或时期的观点差异
template: В противоположность ___, ___ рассматривают ___.
when_to_use: 用于综述中，清晰展示理论演变或学派分歧。
common_mistakes: 对比的维度不清晰或不公平。

function: 说明当前研究在学科发展脉络中的位置
template: Современные подходы к изучению юмора ___ в контексте ___.
when_to_use: 用于综述结尾或引言中，定位自己的研究。

function: 阐述研究对象在某个具体领域中的核心作用
template: ___ в ___ играет ключевую роль, поскольку ___.
when_to_use: 用于讨论章节，解释研究对象发挥作用的内在逻辑。
common_mistakes: 对“角色”的描述过于笼统。

function: 列举并分析研究对象的多重功能
template: Функции ___ в обществе включают ___.
when_to_use: 用于讨论章节，系统梳理研究对象的功能维度。
common_mistakes: 功能列举不全或主次不分。

function: 讨论研究对象的双重性或潜在风险
template: Помимо позитивных функций, ___ может использоваться для ___, что порождает ___.
when_to_use: 用于讨论章节，展现对研究对象复杂性的深入思考。

function: 探讨研究对象的一种特定形式及其社会吸引力因素
template: Популярность ___ (например, черного юмора) объясняется такими факторами, как ___.
when_to_use: 用于讨论章节，分析特定现象流行的深层原因。

function: 明确提出研究的基本理论前提或视角
template: Данное исследование исходит из предположения, что ___.
slots: юмор можно рассматривать как социальный институт
when_to_use: 用于引言或理论框架部分，声明分析的基础。
common_mistakes: 假设过于宽泛或不言自明。

function: 为研究中的核心概念提供操作性定义
template: Под ___ в настоящей работе понимается ___.
slots: любая коммуникативная стратегия, направленная на создание комического эффекта
when_to_use: 用于方法论或理论章节开头，统一关键术语的理解。

function: 高度概括研究的核心发现
template: В ходе исследования было установлено, что ___.
slots: юмор выполняет множество социальных функций, выходящих за рамки развлечения
when_to_use: 用于结论章节开头，总结主要成果。

function: Introduces a specific industrial problem and its technological context.
template: Production of ___ [6] for the ___ industry is characterized by high requirements for ___ and the use of ___ materials [7].
when_to_use: To state the core challenge in an engineering domain, linking quality demands with material constraints.
common_mistakes: Making the statement too general (e.g., 'industry has requirements').

function: Explains why increasing productivity in a specific process is important.
template: Achieving high ___ in the machining of ___ materials shifts the optimal ___ values towards higher ranges.
when_to_use: To argue for the necessity of a technical improvement by linking material properties to process parameters.
common_mistakes: Stating the motivation without linking the cause (material property) to the effect (parameter shift).

function: Points out shortcomings in existing feed drive control systems.
template: Analysis of the influence of the control system operating principle on ___ accuracy reveals inherent ___.
when_to_use: To critically assess prior work and motivate the need for a new control strategy.
common_mistakes: Being overly critical without citing specific systems.
Failing to define the accuracy metric (contouring).

function: Identifies a need for new methods based on a review.
template: Review and analysis of existing methods for improving ___ accuracy indicates a research gap in ___.
slots: coordinated multi-axis control based on velocity mismatch signals
when_to_use: To explicitly state what is missing in the field after surveying the literature.
common_mistakes: Vaguely stating 'more research is needed' without specifying the gap.
Not linking the gap to the limitations found earlier.

function: Describes the process of determining model parameters from experiments.
template: Experimental determination of the model parameters along the ___ axis involves ___.
slots: recording step responses and performing system identification
when_to_use: To describe the methodology for obtaining key model parameters in a control system.
common_mistakes: Omitting the specific axis or component.
Not explaining the general experimental method (e.g., step response, frequency response).

function: Outlines the high-level steps of a control algorithm or strategy.
template: The developed control strategy involves generating the toolpath, generating velocity/acceleration profiles, and an algorithm for ___.
slots: comparing velocity mismatch signals in dynamic mode
when_to_use: To provide an overview of a proposed multi-step technical solution.
common_mistakes: Using overly technical jargon in the overview that obscures the pipeline.

function: Describes a specific algorithm for dynamic signal comparison.
template: An algorithm for comparing the magnitudes of velocity mismatch signals along each axis operates by ___.
slots: continuously calculating and comparing the tracking errors of the individual axes in real-time
when_to_use: To detail the core computational step of a novel control method.
common_mistakes: Describing the algorithm in purely physical terms without the computational aspect.
Not specifying the inputs and outputs of the comparison step.

function: Describes the test trajectories used for experimental validation.
template: Experimental verification is conducted using test trajectories such as a ___, a ___, and ___.
when_to_use: To specify the geometric patterns or paths used to evaluate a machining or control system.
common_mistakes: Listing trajectories without explaining why they are challenging or representative.
Using only simple line-based paths when curves are relevant.

function: Indicates where quantitative comparison data is presented.
template: Results for the ___ trajectory are presented, showing the contouring error under different control strategies.
when_to_use: To direct the reader to data comparing the proposed method against baselines for a specific test case.
common_mistakes: Failing to name the specific trajectory or scenario for which results are given.
Not mentioning what metric (e.g., contouring error) is being compared.

function: Explains why a proposed method works by describing its physical or logical effect.
template: The channel controlling the ___ ensures coordinated motion by regulating the relative contribution of each axis.
when_to_use: To provide a deeper, causal explanation for the effectiveness of a technical approach.
common_mistakes: Restating the result without adding explanatory insight.
Using a vague mechanism like 'improves performance'.

function: Addresses the requirement for real-time implementation of a control system.
template: A practical approach to the structure of a control system for machining accuracy must operate in ___.
when_to_use: To emphasize the non-negotiable constraint of timely computation in control applications.
common_mistakes: Mentioning 'real-time' without discussing the computational demands or hardware required.
Using it as a generic buzzword without context.

function: Briefly recaps the main technical contribution of the work.
template: The work presents a control strategy based on comparing velocity mismatch signals to improve ___.
when_to_use: To provide a concise summary of the thesis's core innovation in the concluding section.
common_mistakes: Omitting the key technical concept (velocity mismatch signal comparison).

function: To describe the unique or significant nature of the research subject at the start of the introduction.
template: The research subjects, ___, are unique constructions that serve as autonomous systems and were built in an experimental manner.
when_to_use: At the very beginning of an introduction to establish the importance and special context of the study object.
common_mistakes: Using overly technical jargon that fails to convey the subject's uniqueness.
Not specifying the challenging environment or conditions.

function: To give a high-level overview of a proposed analytical or diagnostic methodology.
template: The proposed methodology for assessing the ___ is based on a combination of non-destructive testing and material property correlation.
when_to_use: When introducing a new method or approach in the methodology chapter, before detailing individual steps.
common_mistakes: Starting with implementation details instead of the overall goal and core principle.
Being too vague about the types of methods combined.

function: To formally introduce the data or materials used in the study.
template: The investigation focuses on the ___ of steel specimens from pipelines after ___ years of operation.
when_to_use: In the experimental or data description section to specify what was studied and under what conditions.
common_mistakes: Forgetting to mention the origin or operational history of the specimens.
Using passive voice excessively, making the description clunky.

function: To report a specific quantitative relationship found in the results.
template: A correlation was established between the ___ and the material's mechanical property, yielding a coefficient of ___.
when_to_use: When presenting key quantitative findings, especially relationships between different measurements.
common_mistakes: Reporting the correlation without specifying the involved variables.
Not providing the numerical value or a measure of strength.

function: To state the practical applicability of the research findings.
template: The developed ___ can be applied in the technical diagnostics of ___ under conditions of prolonged operation.
when_to_use: In the conclusion to bridge theoretical findings to practical applications.
common_mistakes: Making overly broad claims of applicability without specifying target systems or conditions.
Not linking back to the core problem stated in the introduction.

function: Statement of fundamental research problem
template: Формулировка фундаментальной проблемы ___ применительно к цели диссертационных исследований
slots: установления причинно-следственных связей в сложной системе
when_to_use: Opening of problem statement section to frame scope

function: Statement of dissertation objective
template: Методология ___ на основе ___
slots: объединенной стратегии многокритериальной оптимизации, моделирования и интеллектуального анализа данных
when_to_use: Defining the overarching dissertation goal

function: Preview of main contribution types
template: Разработка ___ как основы ___
when_to_use: Previewing contributions in introduction

function: Comparative analysis of methods
template: Сравнительные исследования ___ и ___
when_to_use: Section comparing two methodological approaches

function: Classification of existing approaches
template: Анализ существующих методов и алгоритмических средств ___
when_to_use: Survey chapter opening for systematic review

function: Identifying gaps in prior approaches
template: Анализ существующих методических средств ___ и новых технологий ___
when_to_use: Motivating new approach via limitations of existing work

function: Stating model assumptions
template: Общая структура ___ с учетом возможностей ___
when_to_use: Introducing modeling framework with assumptions

function: Defining parameter space boundaries
template: Проблема формирования и размерности пространства ___
when_to_use: Discussing parameter space and constraints

function: Introducing system constraints
template: Формирование ансамбля критериев качества, соответствующих ___
when_to_use: Defining quality criteria for optimization

function: Overview of methodological pipeline
template: Постановка задачи разработки ___ как основы ___
when_to_use: Outlining the methodological pipeline

function: Describing algorithmic steps
template: Разработка методов ___ как одного из подходов к ___
when_to_use: Presenting specific method within broader framework

function: Defining method parameters
template: Конкретизация задач и структуры ___
when_to_use: Refining problem statement for method implementation

function: Conservative stability claims
template: Проблема устойчивости в теории и практике ___
when_to_use: Discussing method stability characteristics

function: Formal definition introduction
template: Определение ___ как объекта ___
when_to_use: Formally defining key concepts

function: Introducing formal constraints
template: Постановка задачи ___ в рамках проблемы ___
when_to_use: Formulating optimization constraints

function: Introducing mathematical symbols
template: Формирование ансамбля критериев качества и классификация ___
when_to_use: Introducing notation and classification systems

function: Opening a new section with context
template: Постановка задачи разработки ___ и определение ее основных составляющих
when_to_use: Transitioning to new chapter or section

function: Closing section with summary
template: Разработка общих теоретических методов ___ применяемых для ___
when_to_use: Section closing to synthesize findings

function: Listing specific research tasks
template: Обзор состояния исследований и модификация методов ___
when_to_use: Listing specific research tasks in introduction

function: Establishing relevance of research
template: Применение аналитических методов к задаче ___
when_to_use: Establishing practical relevance

function: Motivating the research
template: Механизм формирования новых внутренних связей между ___
when_to_use: Explaining why the research is needed

function: Identifying research gap
template: Обзор состояния исследований и модификация ___
when_to_use: Identifying gaps in existing literature

function: Positioning own work
template: Принципы и основные составляющие разрабатываемой ___
when_to_use: Positioning contribution relative to prior work

function: Introducing system notation
template: Фронт Парето как объект ___ и ___
when_to_use: Formally introducing key mathematical objects

function: Discussing parameter identifiability
template: Место многокритериальной оптимизации в рамках решения ___ и ___ проблем
when_to_use: Discussing which parameters can be identified

function: Justifying model simplifications
template: Разработка методов ___ как подхода к формированию моделей
when_to_use: Justifying simplifications in complex models

function: Specifying method inputs and outputs
template: Общая структура ___ и формирование входных и выходных ___
when_to_use: Defining clear I/O for proposed method

function: Providing implementation details
template: Основные компоненты разрабатываемой ___
when_to_use: Detailing implementation aspects

function: Describing ablation study plan
template: Анализ предмета исследований и постановка задачи ___
when_to_use: Planning component-wise evaluation

function: Lemma-style mathematical statement
template: Обоснование необходимости разработки новых подходов и формулировка ___
when_to_use: Presenting formal mathematical propositions

function: Explaining underlying mechanisms
template: Механизм формирования ___ между составляющими ___
when_to_use: Discussing why the method works

function: Discussing generalizability
template: Общие теоретические методы ___ применяемые для ___
when_to_use: Discussing scope of generalization
